title: Deepwater Horizon

description: This film is adapted from real events and tells the story of a team of oil workers who faced the worst man-made disaster in history and used their supreme courage and determination to fight against the disaster and save themselves. Forty miles offshore, on the vast ocean of the Gulf of Mexico stands the world's top offshore drilling platform, the "Deepwater Horizon." Platform deputy manager Mike Williams (played by Mark Wahlberg) is about to lead his team to complete a record-breaking depth drilling operation. Unexpectedly, the sudden instability of well pressure and pressure flushing caused the emergency safety system to malfunction, which immediately triggered a series of explosions. Deep-sea crude oil broke through the manhole cover and spewed out, forming an oil column tens of meters high, and a huge fire ensued. Millions of tons of crude oil poured out. The entire drilling platform and the nearby sea level were surrounded by thick smoke and raging fires, turning it into a hell on earth, with 126 drilling workers trapped inside. Because the fire was so intense, the marine rescue team could not get close. Mike led several brave companions to launch a self-rescue operation. They searched for and rescued the injured, arranged for evacuation, and held on until the last moment. The drilling platform is about to sink, and Mike and his companions must escape in dire straits.

North Korean ambassador Lee Hak-soo (played by Lee Kyung-young) and spy Pyo Jong-sung (played by Ha Jung-woo) discover that another cold-blooded spy from the motherland, Dong Myung-soo (played by Ryu Seung-bum), has appeared in Berlin. The change of regime has filled their hearts with ominous premonitions after years of wandering overseas. During this period, Zong Sheng had to follow the party's instructions to monitor the whereabouts of his wife, the ambassador's personal translator Yeon Jung Hee (played by Jun Ji Hyun). On the other hand, Minister Kang (played by Han Seok-gyu), the head of the South Korean intelligence agency who suffered setbacks in the pursuit of arms transactions, was unwilling to fail and continued to trace Jong Sheng's traces.
                                    
                                After the ambassador's defection plan failed, Zong Sheng learned Dong Mingxiu's true purpose of coming to Berlin. In order to avoid becoming a victim of the power struggle and the target of purge, he had no choice but to flee with his wife...

title: Tangled
leader: ['Mandy Moore', 'Zachary Levi', 'Donal Murphy', 'Ron Perlman', 'Mike Connor Gainey', 'Jeffrey Tambor', 'Brad Garnett', 'Paul F. Tompkins', 'Richard Gere', 'Delaney Roth Stein', 'Nathan Graynor', 'Byron Howard', 'Tim Mertens']
description:
The witch Gothel (voiced by Donna Murphy) relies on a magical golden flower to stay young. The queen was seriously ill, and the king sent someone to find this golden flower to treat the queen. The queen recovered and gave birth to a little girl with blond hair, Rapunzel (voiced by Mandy Moore). The witch lost the golden flower, but found that the little princess's blond hair had the same magic power, so she stole Rapunzel and locked her up in a tall tower without stairs in the forest.
                                        
                                    Eighteen years later, Rapunzel was raised by the witch and grew into a beautiful woman with long blond hair. She longed for the outside world more and more. The witch tried every means to keep Rapunzel by her side in order to stay young forever. One day, the thief Flynn (voiced by Zachary Levi) stole the princess's crown and fled into the forest. Out of curiosity, he boarded this mysterious tower and accidentally bumped into Rapunzel in the tower. Accompanied by Flynn, Rapunzel walked down the tower and began the adventure of life and love.
                                        
                                    This film is Disney's 50th...

title: A Monster Calls
leader: ['Lewis MacDougall', 'Sigourney Weaver', 'Felicity Jones', 'Liam Neeson', 'Toby Kebbell', 'Ben Moore', 'James Melville', 'Dominic Boyle', 'Jennifer Lim', 'Morgan Symes', 'Freda Parson', 'Wanda Oplinska']
description: Teenager Connor has had nightmares every night since his mother started undergoing chemotherapy. In his dreams, he was always tortured by dark and gloomy weather, strong winds, screams, and hands that could not be clenched no matter how hard he tried. He always had nightmares with the same content, until one day an uninvited guest appeared at home. The devil with an ancient aura told Connor that it was summoned by him, and that it wanted to exchange three stories for Connor's own true story. Connor is not afraid of the devil, because what he is facing - his beloved mother is dying step by step, is even more terrifying. The night makes Connor feel weird, and his life during the day is also very difficult. Connor's father left their mother and son, and the grandmother who came to take care of their lives did not get along well with Connor. On top of that, he had to endure the bleak days at school - the exaggerated sympathy of his teachers and the bullying of his classmates. Gradually, Connor discovered that there was a certain pattern in the time the demon appeared every night, and the unknown stories it told seemed to imply something. Is it the messenger of death, or is it the miracle that Connor expected? And the story that Connor has been unwilling to fulfill his promise to the devil is actually the darkest thing in his heart...

title: driver

description:
This film mainly tells a pure Hong Kong police and gangster story with racing as the core.
                                    
                                Chen Xiang (played by Shawn Yue) is a new member of the elite "Stealth Team" of the Police Traffic Department. He is a fierce and jealous man who drives a disguised police car and hides on the road to pursue his target. Jiang Xin (played by Guo Xiaodong) is a "driver" who specializes in helping robbers escape by car. He dominates the car industry with his "8000 rpm, 2 mile" right-angle suspension drift technology, and has never failed since his debut. The retired police officer Lu Feng (played by Anthony Wong) has a timid and conservative personality. As Chen Xiang's partner in the police force, the two often end up at each other's throats when performing missions together. In a battle with Jiang Xin many years ago, Lu left a deep psychological shadow. This time, Jiang Xin returned to commit crimes, and Chen Xiang chased him into a narrow alley, almost causing a car crash and death. In order to save Chen Xiang, Lu Feng drove the "invisible tank" again to fight against the gangsters. A thrilling, life-or-death speed-drive battle between cops and robbers is about to begin.

title: Warrior Warrior

description: This is a broken family. The alcoholic coach father Paddy (Nick Nolte) domestically abuses his wife. The second son Tommy (Tom Hardy) and his unbearable mother leave for a foreign country; the eldest son Brandon (Joel Edgerton) chooses to stay for love and believes that he can gain his father's respect and cultivation from now on. However, in the end the father and son parted ways. Many years later, Tommy found his father with the sad memory of his mother's painful death and the painful experience in the Iraq war, asking the latter to serve as his coach again to participate in MMA's high-prize competition; almost at the same time, Brandon, a former professional fighter and now a middle school physics teacher, was troubled by money. He could not bear that he could not provide shelter for his wife and daughter, and decided to return to the competition. In the MMA arena, these brothers who have been separated for many years will reunite again and use blood and sweat to resolve each other's knots...

Compared with the storms he experienced before, the peaceful days staying with his family now seem particularly rare. However, reality does not want to let Bullock go easily. The stability Bullock finally built is about to be destroyed.

In order to do all this, she must put aside her anger and distrust, she must become the mockingjay of the rebels - no matter what the cost.

title: Green Lantern Green Lantern

title: Anti-corruption storm 3 L storm

Before long, the leader of the witch (Famke Janssen) led his men to attack the town and started a head-on conflict with the two brothers and sisters. After a fierce battle, Gretel was severely injured, and Hansel also disappeared with the witch.

They originally thought that the micro-robots were also destroyed in the fire, but Hiro and Baymax accidentally discovered that someone was mass-producing his invention in an abandoned factory.

Although their lives were simple and poor, they were full of happiness. title: Seediq Bale (Part 1): Flag of the Sun Seediq Bale (Part 1) Flag of the Sun
leader: ['Lin Qingtai', 'You Daqing', 'Ma Zhixiang', 'Ando Masanobu', 'Kawahara Satake', 'Kimura Yuichi', 'Viv Hsu', 'Wen Lan', 'Luo Meiling', 'Tanaka Chie']
description:
This film is adapted from the historical facts of the Wushe Incident.
                                    
                                In 1895, after the Treaty of Shimonoseki ceded Taiwan, Japan immediately took over Taiwan by force, and various parts of the island were attacked one after another. However, due to the impassable roads in Taiwan's mountainous areas, the lives of the aborigines have not yet been affected. Among the Seediq people in the Wushe area, Mona Ludao (played by You Daqing), the younger generation of Mahpo, is extremely brave and leads his tribe to fight endlessly against the Ganzhuo people. The Japanese coveted the rich resources in the Wushe area and tried to get involved, but were met with strong resistance from the Seediqs and suffered heavy casualties. Then they finally invaded Wushe by taking advantage of the mutual vendetta between the indigenous groups. Mona Ludo had no choice but to humiliate and surrender, but the fire in his heart never went out. The time is pushed forward to 1930. Japan's "civilization transformation" of the Wushe aborigines took many years. The so-called civilization such as Japanese did not give the aborigines an equal life. The oppression and heavy labor of the Japanese eroded the tradition and dignity of the Seediq people. Years of accumulated anger finally erupted in this year!

title: Railway Flying Tiger

description: After the outbreak of the Pacific War in 1941, the Jinpu Railway passing through Shandong became one of the most important strategic transportation lines for the Japanese army in mainland China. The captain is Ma Yuan, the porter foreman at the railway station. They worked in the train station occupied and managed by the Japanese during the day, and went out to operate secretly at night. Using their familiarity with the railway lines and their special skills of picking up and driving trains, they used a small guerrilla force to compete with a large number of well-equipped Japanese regular troops. After urgently completing the psychological treatment of the patient Daokeng Nan (played by Ren Long), he and his girlfriend drove from Shanghai to the home of Susie's parents in Hangzhou in a car borrowed from his best friend Wu Fendan (played by Guo Mingxiang). The test questions that Fan Jianqiang prepared in advance to deal with his father-in-law and mother-in-law could not deceive Su Bohu, who had previously advised him, so he had to be honest with him. The two people who knew each other well had constant conflicts and jokes as soon as they met. Can the impoverished Fan Jianqiang win the approval of his father-in-law and finally...

title: Elephant sitting on the ground

description: There is an elephant in Manzhouli Zoo, sitting there every day. The boy who stood up for his friend, the bully brother who avenged his brother, and the girl behind bars were stuck in the dark gaps of the world and couldn't escape, but they struggled to see the elephant. On a bleak winter day, desperate figures collided in the asymmetrical and unbalanced images, bursting the oppressive depression and spreading wantonly in the low-cost production with rough scenery and hazy lighting. The first film by author and director Hu Bo (pseudonym Hu Qian), with its youthful simplicity and shocking sensibility, was recognized by the Berlin Film Festival and shortlisted for the forum section, but it is a missing piece of the puzzle that cannot fit into the harmonious theme. Not being able to see elephants is a common fate, and Hu Bo's sudden death has become a regret for this generation.

title: The Legend of the White-Haired Witch: The Kingdom of the Moon

description:
Zhuo Yihang (played by Huang Xiaoming), the grandson of Zhuo Zhonglian, Governor of Sichuan and Shaanxi, has just become the new head of the Wudang Sect. Unexpectedly, the giant eunuch Wei Zhongxian (played by Ni Dahong) got in the way and poisoned Ming Guangzong, who had just ascended the throne, with fake red pills. After that, he took control of the government and sent Jin Yiwei to hunt down Zhuo Yihang. At the same time, Jin Duyi (played by Zhao Wenzhuo), the deputy general of Sichuan and Shaanxi, plotted to kill Zhuo Zhonglian and framed Yu Luosha (played by Fan Bingbing), a demon woman who rescued the victims. Jade Rakshasa and Zhuo Yifan, who met once during the melee, met again and fell in love. However, the good times did not last long. Jinyiwei's claws extended to Mingyue Village and Wudang Mountain where Jade Rakshasa was located, and the lovers were forced to separate. In order to avoid the collapse of Wudang, Zhuo Yihang had to bear the humiliation and return to the eunuch party.                                 In the autumn of troubled times, legends of men and women have been passed down through the ages...

The girl Jivana (played by Tess Amorim) and the boy Leo (played by Ghilherme Lobo) are best friends. "Love, Simple" still tells the story of love that spans vision in hands, but compared with the short film, the focus of the story has shifted from sexual awakening to the independent growth of the protagonist. Independence becomes the core of the film, which also includes his free will to independently choose who to love. "Love, Simple" won the Panorama Section of the 64th Berlin Film Festival. International film critic Fibisi...

Awen couldn't stand his younger son who always brought trouble, and pinned all his hopes on his eldest son Ahao (Xu Guanghan), a gifted student. title: Gone Girl Gone Girl

Female detective Rhonda Bonnie (played by Kim Dickens) rushes to investigate after receiving the report, and the various clues left at the scene seem to indicate that this is not an ordinary disappearance case, and that behind it may be hidden a murder that broke out from the relationship between husband and wife. Amy's disappearance quickly became famous throughout the country through the media's exaggeration and speculation. Nick, who had bad behavior, was pushed to the forefront.                                 The film is adapted from the novel of the same name by Gillian Flynn.

description:
One midsummer in childhood, the girl Mianma (voiced by Kayano Ai) died in an accident. This sudden death deeply hurt her five childhood playmates - Renta, An Ming, Yukiji, Tsurumiko and Bobo. The secret base "Super Peace Busters" composed of six people was disbanded, and the five living people grew apart and grew up separately with irreparable trauma. One year after Mian Ma fulfilled his wish and disappeared, Renta and the five of them reunited and each wrote letters to Mian Ma, recalling the miracle that happened to the six "Super Peaceful Busters" last summer.

The beautiful girl Jessie (Elle Fanning) is a young female model who lives alone in Los Angeles. She sets foot in the colorful world for the first time. She seems ignorant and harmless. title: Another Earth Another Earth

On a calm night, a speeding car crashed into the happy life of music professor John (William Mapother). The sense of guilt made her live the lowest life, but she could never escape the condemnation of her soul. By chance, she meets John again and walks into John's hopeless life in the name of a cleaning staff. After getting along for a period of time, they gradually warmed each other's scarred hearts. At the same time, humans discovered a planet that is very similar to the earth, and another human being seems to live there. Is this hope or a beautiful dream?

title: Beautiful city La grande Bellezza

description:
Rome, summer, a group of tourists passing through. This breathtakingly beautiful ancient city is tempting them with a mysterious and cold attitude, making people willing to be captured and intoxicated by this exquisite and despairing beauty. However, in the eyes of Jip Gambardella (Toni Servillo), Rome is a lonely city. The 65-year-old Jabil is a successful journalist, personable and charming. A literary work he wrote in his youth brought him fame and fortune at an early age. He wandered through all kinds of wanton extravagance and social interactions, and with a pair of eyes so cold that they were almost numb, he witnessed the emptiness and secrets behind this beautiful city. When the soprano's aria sounded again, Jip, who was wandering between civilian life and the upper class, began to regain the memories of his lost youth. Only the city of Rome still retained its indifference and beauty, unchanged.

description:
The film is a remake of a 2005 Chilean film "In Bed", but the director changed the structure of a man and a woman in the original film into an encounter between two girls.
                                    
                                On the first night of early summer, Alba (Elena Anaya), a Spanish mother of two children, and Natasha (Natasha Yarovenko), a Russian girl who is about to get married in a week, meet in Rome, the ancient capital of Italy. The secrets of two women blossomed in a Roman room. The God of Love's arrow shot at them from the sky, and desire opened up an ambiguous and interesting moment for them. The concealment and defensiveness of the two when they first met began to melt one by one. The thoughts of the two women blended together in such a cool early summer. This was a 12-hour erotic feast that lasted through the night and until dawn. The arrival of morning heralds the separation from each other, and they have to face the test of real life and spiritual freedom. Will the city of Rome eventually become a transit point for them, or a new starting point?

James was hired by the CIA to negotiate with the Soviet Union on behalf of the United States, trying to negotiate prisoner exchange terms with the Soviet Union and rescue the hijacked American pilots with an extremely slim chance.
                                    
                                The film is adapted from the real experience of American lawyer James Donovan.

description:
In a car parked on the roadside, the yellow-haired boy Ryan (Phi Vu) was awakened by the horns of other cars. He walked down in a daze, wandered all the way into the campus and entered the laboratory. Due to the huge energy consumption of the device being studied, the dean of the college angrily ordered Ryan to stop the project. The worst thing didn't stop there, he was killed by a masked guy shortly afterwards. However, he woke up again and found that he was still lying in the car, and everything that happened next was the same as in the "dream". Ryan was panicked and found his good friend Carter Davis (Israel Broussard) and his girlfriend Terry Gelbman (Jessica Rothe).
                                    
                                This reincarnation of life and death is all too familiar to Terry. She first told Ryan about her experience, and then told him that the only way to end the reincarnation was to find the murderer. And then, not only did they discover that Ryan's device seemed to be a cause of reincarnation, but Terry also returned to that terrible morning again...

After helping Chenjiagou successfully block Troy, silly Yang Luchan (played by Yuan Xiaochao) and Chen Yuniang (played by Yang Ying) got married. But on the happy day, the eldest brother of the Chen family Zaiyang (played by Feng Shaofeng) returned home with his wife Yuner (played by Xie Xinying). The family reunion is a rekindling of old friendships. The sole head of the family, Chen Changxing (played by Tony Leung Ka Fai), is wary of the arrival of his eldest son, and opposes the talented Lu Chan's high hopes. After that, one after another instability quietly grew in Chenjiagou. Zaiyang told the clan members about the ringing of copper bells at night and the reason why boxing skills were not spread to people with other surnames. This caused the whole village to regard Lu Chan as a savage beast and drove him out of Chenjiagou. After planting rice with various sinister intentions, Fang Zijing (played by Peng Yuyan) with a heart for revenge disappears and appears.

description: During the graduation season, four best friends from the performance departments of prestigious universities each dreamed of entering society. Liu Min (played by Yoon Eun-hye) decided to break up with her senior boyfriend because of the latter's stinginess and narrow-mindedness. With Huizhi's introduction, she met the second generation rich and found a job as a television assistant. She accidentally met a fan from middle school and talked to each other about their feelings about work. Soo Jin (Cha Ye Ryun) wanted to be an actress with all her heart, but unfortunately she was repeatedly frustrated and unemployed. She secretly tampered with her academic qualifications in order to get a tutoring position. Min Hee (played by Yoo In Na) was too lazy to watch her parents' cold war and divorce, so she decided to go to a cram school to save her terrible English. Unexpectedly, she met an enemy student. The four sisters each encounter new choices and challenges in their lives. When love and career challenge friendship, how will they respond...

title: Xu Sanguan 허삼관

description:
The story takes place in South Korea in the 1960s. Xu Sanguan (played by Ha Jung-woo), a poor young man living in a certain village, fell in love with the most beautiful girl in the village, Xu Yulan (played by Ha Ji-won). It was rumored that Magnolia was the girlfriend of the gangster He Xiaoyong, but Sanguan persuaded his future father-in-law with his perseverance and foolhardy energy, and he got the beauty as he wished. A few years after their marriage, the couple had three clever and naughty sons, Yi Le, Er Le and San Le, and the family's life was also enjoyable. However, Yile became more and more like He Xiaoyong, which caused a lot of discussion among the villagers. This made Xu Sanguan restless, and his feelings for Yulan and Yile seemed to have changed as a result. In that era when selling blood was common, Sanguan once exchanged his own blood for money. What he didn't expect was that in the rest of his life, he would have to sell blood again and again for his family. He was pale and frail, and his life was hanging by a thread...
                                    
                                This film is adapted from Yu Hua's novel "Xu Sanguan Sells Blood".

title: beauty and the beast
leader: ['Vincent Cassel', 'Léa Seydoux', 'André Dussoulier', 'Eduardo Noriega', 'Miriam Salins', 'Audrey Lamy', 'Sarah Girardeau', 'Jonathan Demuge', 'Nicolas Gaub', 'Luca Meliava', 'Yvonne Catfield', 'Dejan Buchin', 'Wolfgang Menardy', 'Mickey Hart', 'Arthur Doppler']
description:
On his way home, a businessman (André Dussollier) encountered a rare snowstorm. In the darkness, the businessman accidentally arrived in front of a luxurious and mysterious castle. The merchant was treated like a distinguished guest in the castle, but until the end, the merchant still did not know who the owner of the castle was. The snowstorm stopped, and the businessman was about to leave. Before leaving, he decided to pick a rose in the garden and give it to his favorite little daughter Belle (Léa Seydoux). What he didn't expect was that a ferocious beast (Vincent Cassel) appeared in front of him and demanded his life.
                                    
                                The businessman returned home in despair and told his six children what had happened to him. Belle, who loved her father so much, decided to replace her father and came to the castle alone. However, what awaits Belle is not death, but more warm hospitality. The Beast's only request for her is not to leave the castle for even half a step. Belle is not afraid of the beast, and as time passes, the relationship between the two grows closer.

title: Mr. Popper's Penguins Mr. Popper's Penguins

description:
Mr. Pope (Jim Carrey) is an efficient businessman with a great enthusiasm for his work. He is highly regarded in the company, but he often sacrifices time with his family because of this. This winter, while he is going all out to win a nerve-wracking partner, his ex-wife Amanda (Carla Gugino) is also preparing to start her next relationship. However, everything takes an unexpected turn with the arrival of a courier box - Mr. Pope inherits the most unusual property from his late father: a live penguin. Just when he was helpless, he received five more live penguins. The penguins once made a mess of Mr. Pope's regular life and work, but his young son loved the penguins very much. However, in a big city like New York, although raising penguins is fun, it is definitely not easy...
                                    
                                The film is adapted from the children's novel of the same name co-written by Richard and Florence Atwater.

title: Water for Elephants Water for Elephants

description: The story begins with an old man in his 90s reminiscing about his life during the Great Depression. 23-year-old Jacobi (played by Robert Pattinson) was forced to drop out of a prestigious school because his parents died and he was unable to pay his tuition. By chance, he took on the job of doing chores and taking care of animals in a second-rate circus. The magic weapon of the circus is an elephant named Rosie, which is a very spiritual animal. It's a pity that the cruel circus director August (Christoph Waltz) never knows how to care for animals. On the contrary, his wife Malena (played by Reese Witherspoon) loves the circus animals full of maternal love. Therefore, Jacobi gradually fell in love with the beautiful woman in the days to come. They were discovered by August when they decided to elope, but it was Rosie's amazing move that fulfilled their love. Rosie's behavior also became a secret that Jacob kept for seventy years. title: The Butler

description: In 1926, Cecil, a young boy, witnessed his father being shot and killed by a farmer in the cotton fields of Georgia. From then on, racial discrimination cast a lifelong shadow in his heart. In the late 1950s, Cecil Gaines (Forest Whitaker), who was living in Washington, was unexpectedly appreciated by the head of the White House internal affairs and was elected to work as a catering service at the center of national politics. He kept his boss's teachings in mind, observed words and expressions, and dissolved himself in the air. In the years that followed, Cecil served Presidents such as Eisenhower (Robin Williams), Kennedy (James Marsden), Johnson (Liev Schreiber), Nixon (John Cusack), Reagan (Alan Rickman) and other presidents who each wrote an important chapter in American history. Focusing on the civil rights struggle of black people, he, the president, his family and his compatriots also experienced unforgettable moments...

description:
Kamakura, the ancient capital by the sea, is a small town along the mountains. In an inconspicuous corner, there live the four sisters of the Xiangda family. Their father ran away from home with his lover in his early years, and their mother simply left the girls in the care of their grandmother. After their grandmother passed away, the granddaughters inherited this large house with a long history. The elder sister Koda Yuki (played by Haruka Ayase), who took on the responsibility of the family prematurely, does her best to take care of the healthy growth of her two younger sisters Kano (played by Masami Nagasawa) and Chika (played by Kaho). On this day, the news of his father's death reached the sisters. They attended their father's funeral together and got acquainted with Qian YeLing (Hirose Sisi), an half-sister they had never met. Xu was close to her by blood, so she invited Suzu to move to Kamakura before leaving. Not long after, Ling walked into the house where her father once lived, holding the longing for her sisters. As the seasons pass, the stories of the sisters are quietly unfolding...
                                    
                                This film is adapted from the manga of the same name by Yoshida Akio.

Hercules (played by Dwayne Johnson), the son of Zeus, has suffered unimaginable pain and suffering in the world since he was a child. He completed the twelve trials arranged by God and created a demigod legend that is admired by everyone. In fact, Hercules, the god of Hercules, only stepped onto the dazzling altar with the help of Autolix (Rufus Sewell), Anfiaraos (Ian McShane), Atalanta (Ingrid Bolsø Berdal) and other warriors who are enough to entrust their lives. The hero and his companions travel around as mercenaries, never seeming to care about what is just. One day, Hercules was hired by the King of Thrace, Kordus, to help him train an invincible army and thwart the rebellion of the evil wizard Rexos. But as the war came to an end, Hercules was pulled down from the altar by conspiracy, and had to face the most painful memories in his heart and the last cruel trial in his life...
                                    
                                The film is adapted from the comics by Steve Moore.

Chris was so outstanding on the battlefield that he was called a "legend" by his teammates. The terrorists hired professional snipers to hunt him down with high bonuses, but failed every time. However, his teammates around him encountered accidents one by one. Although his wife repeatedly begged him to retire, he went out for the last time with the belief of revenge for his teammates...

description: Wu Shun (Tony Leung Ka-fai) and Toto (Eric Tsang) were originally good brothers who grew up in housing estates. Thirty years later, Wu Shun, whose business went bankrupt, returned to the housing estate with his family and his family. Shortly after, the water dragon unexpectedly appeared. The two of them recalled the past together, filled with emotion, and the grudge in Wu Shun's heart gradually disappeared. description:
The seventy-year-old lady Shen Mengjun (played by Gui Yalei) gets older and has a more tempered temper. Gradually, no one wants to live with her except the housekeeper Li Dahai (played by Wang Deshun) who is still willing to stay with her. After his daughter-in-law Yang Qin (played by Li Yijuan) fell ill and was admitted to the hospital due to excessive stress, Shen Mengjun was finally sent to a nursing home by his family. In anger and sadness, Shen Mengjun decided to leave his last appearance in a photo studio. Unexpectedly, this started a fantasy journey of rejuvenation.
                                    
                                In the blink of an eye, the wrinkled Shen Mengjun turned into a 20-year-old young girl Meng Lijun (played by Yang Zishan). Shen Mengjun, who regained his youth, not only experienced the opportunities and vitality brought by youth, but also tasted the sour taste of love. However, just when she was immersed in the illusion of happiness and couldn't extricate herself, an accident threw her at a crossroads in life. title: Ronal Barbaren

description:
The hero Crane rescued the people enslaved by the demon Zaal, but he was stabbed in the heart. His blood flowed for seven days and seven nights. One hundred people drank his blood and inherited his strength, and the barbarian race was born. But Zaal is resurrected every thousand years, and Tina needs an ordinary person to drink a bowl of the blood of all barbarians to complete the transformation. Warlord Volcazar wants to use this opportunity to become a demon and dominate the Metalonien continent. He attacked the barbarian village and captured almost all the barbarians, but missed the thin and timid Ronal. Driven by fate, the arduous task of saving the lives of his compatriots fell on his shoulders. Before his death, his uncle told Ronal to find the prophet in the north for help. Without confidence, he had no choice but to set off.
                                    
                                But the hero's adventure is never lonely, and Alibert, the lead singer of the troupe, joined him. On the way, he met Zandra, a female warrior who wanted to find a husband who could defeat her. In other villages, he met the elf guide Elric. To win, Ronal has many difficulties ahead...

The sudden heavy rain outside also brings a gloomy atmosphere to this extraordinary night. Strange figures, footsteps approaching and far away, and terrifying scenes that seemed real and illusory. Now Zhemin is determined to start over, resume his boxing career, and realize the future he and Jinghua designed step by step. However, Jinghua's eye disease is getting worse and worse and she can't wait for them to slowly realize their dreams. At the same time, Zhemin discovered that the car accident that damaged Jinghua's eye mask was actually related to his errands back then. The strong sense of guilt makes Zhemin decide to take risks and participate in underground boxing matches, just to raise medical expenses for Jinghua as quickly as possible. In order to bridge the gap with his family, former CIA agent Brian Mills (Liam Neeson) invites his ex-wife Lenore (Famke Janssen), who is suffering from emotional frustration, and his adolescent daughter Xiaojin (Maggie Grace) to Istanbul for a holiday. Among them, Healy (played by Bryce Dallas Howard) is undoubtedly a negative example. She has an arrogant attitude and is prejudiced against the black maid Minnie (Octavia Spencer). In the end, Minnie couldn't stand the humiliation and left angrily, retaliating in kind and humiliating her under the pretense of apologizing. Skeeter began to interview Abilene and Minnie, hoping to understand the living conditions of the black servants and accumulate material for his new book. Diane is worried that Steve is causing trouble, and Steve is eager to express his love for his mother. The new neighbor Keira (Suzanne Clément) appears at the right time. She decided to sell her happiness and made a painful decision: send her son back to the hospital for treatment...

title: Pride Pride
leader: ['Ben Schnetzer', 'George MacKay', 'Paddy Considine', 'Imelda Staunton', 'Bill Nighy', 'Monica Dolan', 'Dominic West', 'Andrew Scott', 'Joseph Gilgan', 'Faye Massey', 'Freddie Fox', 'Joshua Hill', 'Carina Fernandez', 'Liz White', 'Sofia Evans', 'Russell Tovey']
description:
In 1984, British Prime Minister Margaret Thatcher took an iron-handed approach to suppress the labor movement, and the miners launched the largest strike in history. At the London Gay Pride Parade that same year, a group of gays and lesbians decided to take the initiative to raise funds for striking workers. However, embarrassment also ensued: the union was ashamed to accept their funding! This group of gays decided to bypass the union and go directly into the workers' homes. They drove to a coal mining village in South Wales, bringing money and supplies to working-class families. The two groups with vastly different backgrounds had an unexpectedly warm contact and formed the most unlikely alliance under government pressure.
                                    
                                "Pride" is adapted from real events. It not only has historical images of the labor movement in the 1980s, but also records the most touching page in the history of British gays. The transformation of the two groups from prejudice to tolerance, from misunderstanding to alliance is full of laughter and tears, and it is also moving. "Pride" won the Queer Palm Award at the 67th Cannes Film Festival and the British Best Independent Film Award. It was also nominated for the 2015 Golden Globe Award for Best Comedy Film.

In the last four months of his life and term, Lincoln had been engaged in a battle more difficult than the Civil War: promoting the passage of the 13th Amendment to the Constitution through Congress. This bill would legally and permanently abolish slavery in the United States. However, the timing of the amendment was extremely bad: the idea of ​​abolition lacked public response; Congress was controlled by conservative forces; radicals who supported abolition were also dissatisfied with Lincoln's style. When the seceding southern states expressed their desire to return to the negotiating table and end the Civil War, Lincoln found himself faced with a painful decision: to achieve a compromised peace, or to stick to his inner morality? Ending slavery, or ending war?
                                        
                                    "If slavery wasn't wrong, then nothing was right." Based on the historical book "Team of Rivals: The Political Wisdom of Lincoln," written by Pulitzer Prize winner Tony Kushner, directed by Oscar director Steven Spielberg, and starring two-time actor Daniel Day-Lewis, the biographical blockbuster "Lincoln" leads the audience...

title: Stalingrad Сталинград
leader: ['Pyotr Fyodorov', 'Thomas Kretschmann', 'Maria Smolnikova', 'Yana Studilina', 'Dmitry Rysenkov', 'Alexei Barabash', 'Andrei Smolyakov', 'Sergey Bondarchuk Jr.']
description:
In the autumn of 1942, the most tragic war in human history broke out on the cold land. The Germans crossed the Volga River and reached Stalingrad on the other side to fortify themselves. The Soviet Red Army and its opponents launched a battle for the city. Both sides came and went. The city was reduced to ruins and scorched earth. Thousands of people died. Looking at it, it looked like a hell on earth. During a counterattack, the Soviet army suffered serious casualties. Only the reconnaissance team led by Captain Gromov (Pyotr Fyodorov) reached the other side and occupied a dilapidated building. They find a 19-year-old girl Katya (Mariya Smolnikova) inside the building. Kajia's parents had already died in the war. Because she was attached to the city and home where she could grow freely, the girl stayed here and numbly passed through the flames of war.
                                    
                                In view of the extremely important location of the building, the extremely war-weary German officer Peter Kahn (Thomas Kretschmann) was ordered to recapture the stronghold. In the cruel and merciless Shura field, the never-ending struggle between human nature and animal nature...

The princess Isabel (played by Eleanor Tomlinson), who is unwilling to give her lifelong happiness to others, takes advantage of the chaos and runs away and comes to Jack's house to take shelter from the rain. While they were chatting, the bean pods soaked by the rain suddenly sprouted, and the beanstalks grew wildly, reaching into the sky, and carried the princess trapped in the house into the clouds.

The 35-year-old Suzuki Hero (Oizumi Hiroshi) who lives in Tokyo is the assistant of a famous cartoonist. He published a single book in his early years, but has remained unknown since then. It wasn't until his girlfriend, who had been in cold war for a long time, turned into a terrifying zombie that he discovered that all of Japan had been overrun by a zombie virus called ZQN. The originally orderly city suddenly turned into a hunting ground infested with zombies. When he was in a panic and couldn't choose a way out, he got into a taxi with the female high school student Hiromi Hayakari (played by Kasumi Arimura) and escaped from the city after going through many difficulties and dangers. According to the information received on their mobile phones, they headed towards Mount Fuji, which is unsuitable for survival in the ZQN, and met the survivors where the nurse Yabu (played by Nagasawa Masami) was on the way. title: Women who act coquettishly are the best

description:
Female man Zhang Hui (played by Zhou Xun) has been secretly in love with his classmate Gong Zhiqiang (played by Huang Xiaoming), a silly and cute otaku, since college. Unfortunately, Gong Zhiqiang has always regarded her as his buddy, and insisted on staying single until his career is successful. Zhang Hui has no choice but to wait silently. During a business trip, Zhiqiang met Beibei (played by Sui Tang), a soft girl from Taiwan. Under Beibei's coquettish offensive, Zhiqiang surrendered, and the two instantly fell in love. Zhang Hui was devastated when she learned about the situation. Fortunately, her best friend Ruan Mei (played by Xie Yilin), known as the coquettish queen of Shanghai, came to the rescue. She also found the strongest coquettish group south of the Yangtze River to help, vowing to teach Zhang Hui to train as a coquettish master and regain her true love. title: gold mine gold
leader: ['Matthew McConaughey', 'Edgar Ramirez', 'Bryce Dallas Howard', 'Corey Stoll', 'Toby Kebbell', 'Bill Camp', 'Joshua Halto', 'Timothy Simmons', 'Greg T. Nelson', 'Macon Blair', 'Adam LeFevre', 'Frank Wood', 'Michael Landers', 'Bhavishi Patel', 'Rachel Taylor']
description:
The film is based on the infamous 1993 Bre-X gold mining company fraud case.
                                        
                                    Bre-X Gold Mining Company is a Canadian gold mining company built in a basement. It was listed on the Alberta Stock Exchange in July 1989. At that time, it was only a junk stock of about 25 cents per share. Later, the company bought the mining rights of the Indonesian mine. By mixing gold powder into the rocks, they created the illusion that the mine's ore contained extremely high gold content. The price of the company's stock then ran wild. By April 1996, their stock price had soared to 200 yuan. In October 1996, the Bre-X gold mining company's fraud was exposed, but the assets of thousands of investors had already fallen into the pockets of the company's founders, geologists and others.
                                        
                                    The story of "Gold Mine" tells the story of Kenny Wells, a modern prospector played by Matthew McConaughey, who is eager to explore a big mine. Guided by this dream, Wells teamed up with a similarly unlucky geologist on a desperate expedition to search for gold deep in an uncharted Indonesian rainforest. Bryce Dallas Howard will play McConaughey's character's girlfriend Kay, who always supports her boyfriend...

title: montage 몽타주

description:
15 years ago, a little girl named Xizhen was kidnapped and killed. Although the police officer Oh Ching-ho (played by Kim Sang-kyung) of the Crime Squad promised Xizhen's mother (played by Uhm Jung-hwa) that the murderer would be brought to justice, after a long investigation, nothing was found. Seeing that the prosecution period was approaching, Officer Wu made a desperate move and missed the suspect. After that, Officer Wu left the police force with regrets and lived a decadent life. However, Xizhen's mother never gave up her belief in chasing the murderer. She used her fragile woman's body to launch an independent investigation and finally discovered the clues left by the criminal. Not long after, another little girl was kidnapped in broad daylight. The method of committing the crime was exactly the same as the Xizhen case. The police immediately set up a dragnet to deal with it. Faced with a cunning suspect, the police had no choice but to call out Wu Qinghao from Xianfu's home again.
                                    
                                The little girl's life hangs on a thread. Can Xizhen's mother and Wu Qinghao catch the criminal and fulfill their long-cherished wish...

title: Children 아이들...
leader: ['Park Yong-woo', 'Yoo Seung-ryong', 'Sung Dong-il', 'Joo Jin-mo', 'Sung Ji-lou', 'Kim Yeo-jin', 'Park Byung-eun']
description:
March 26, 1991, Daegu, South Korea. Five boys who studied at Chengxi Primary School went up the mountain together and never returned. The incident caused an uproar. Although the police deployed tens of thousands of search personnel, nothing was found. The whereabouts of the children became an unsolvable mystery. One day four years later, the famous TV producer Jiang Zhisheng was exiled to the remote Daegu by his headquarters on suspicion of fraud. He was arrogant and arrogant and found that local people were still paying attention to the "Missing Frog Case" that many people had forgotten. In order to turn around as soon as possible, Jiang Zhisheng joined hands with Professor Huang, who has been paying attention to the case. The case that has been suffering for many years seems to have a new turn...
                                    
                                This film is adapted from a real case that occurred in Daegu, South Korea in 1991. This case is called the "Missing Frog Boy Case" and is one of the three major unsolved mysteries in South Korea. The body of the missing boy was discovered in 2002. Two other cases have been made into the films "Memories of Murder" and "That Guy's Voice."

Moses received God's will and was determined to rescue thousands of Jewish people from the dire straits of life. He asked Ramses for help, but his friend firmly rejected him. Not only that, Ramesses also carried out an inhumane massacre of the Jews.
                                    
                                In order to punish Ramses for his atrocities, God sent the "Ten Plagues" to Egypt. For a time, Egypt fell into the shadow of chaos and death. However, Ramses did not wake up from this. In the end, he and Moses became old enemies. Moses knew what his mission was. He led 400,000 Hebrews on a long journey to find a homeland that belonged to them.

title: female pupa
leader: ['Zhang Rongrong', 'Ren Quan', 'Li Wei', 'Cui Jie', 'Gao Beibei', 'Yan Qianqian']
description:
The mixed-race beauty Guan Wenxin (played by Zhang Rongrong) and the "white and rich" girl Annie (played by Yan Qianqian) are college classmates. They fell in love with the handsome intern teacher Luo Jia (played by Ren Quan) almost at the same time. Under Annie's active pursuit, she eventually became a couple with Teacher Luo. After graduation, Wenxin, who had no background, became the most popular hairstylist in a hair salon. Annie returned to China after living with Teacher Luo in the United States for two months. She did not wait for her boyfriend's wedding ring because Teacher Luo planned to propose to Wenxin. Angry and angry, Annie kidnapped Wenxin on Valentine's Day and tried to kill her former best friend. After a struggle, Wenxin fell into a coma. When she woke up again, she found that it was May. Three months of memory had become blank, and Annie's whereabouts were unknown. Her broken romance with Luo Jia resumed, but various strange events happened around her one after another.
                                    
                                Anne's resentful ghost seems to have entered Wenxin's body and continues to influence her destiny...

title: Extremely evil and unethical アウトレイジ

description:
The leader of the Ikemoto-gumi (played by Kunimura Shun), who belongs to the Sannokai, the number one gangster organization in Kanto, once became brothers with the leader of the Murase-gumi (played by Ishibashi Renji) of the small organization in prison. The Mountain King Club is ambitious and always covets Murase's land and drug business. Under the instruction of Sanwang Huitou Kato (played by Miura Tomokazu), Chi Yuan ordered his Otomo group to challenge the Murase group. The fierce attacks of Otomo (played by Takeshi Kitano) and the vicious schemes of the Sannokai boss (played by Soichiro Kitamura) caused Murase to retreat steadily and was forced to retire. It was also difficult for him to take charge of the business in the group.
                                    
                                The Otomo group is full of talents. Wakatou Mizuno (played by Shiina Kihei) and cadre Ishihara (played by Ryo Kase) personally presided over the opening of a casino at an embassy in an African country, and they made a lot of money for a while. However, the situation has changed. In the gang society that has long abandoned traditional benevolence and morality, various conspiracies have emerged one after another, and the Dayou Group is in turmoil...

title: Doraemon: Nobita's Treasure Island ドラえもん のび太の宝岛
leader: ['Wasabi Mizuta', 'Emi Ohara', 'Yumi Kasuki', 'Subaru Kimura', 'Tomichi Seki', 'Kotono Mitsuishi', 'Hosori Matsumoto', 'Shihoko Ogino', 'Hisuko Kanemoto', 'Daiki Yamashita', 'Fumiko Orikasa', 'Yuuki Aoi', 'Ryuuzaburo Otomo', 'Saori Hayami', 'Katsu Anri', 'Nomura Kenji', 'Torikai Katsumi', 'Toyama Shoo', 'Kamei Yoshiko', 'Ichijo Kazuya', 'Watanabe Gitsuji', 'Takahashi Shigeo', 'Nagasawa Masami', 'Oizumiyo']
description:
On a hot summer day, Mr. Dekisugi told his friends the story of "Treasure Island". Nobita (voiced by Emi Ohara) was in high spirits, and boasted in front of Fat Tiger (voiced by Subaru Kimura), Xiaofu (voiced by Tomoichi Seki) and Shizuka (voiced by Yumi Kasuki) that he would find the pirate's treasure. Of course, in the end he still has to rely on his loyal good friend Doraemon (voiced by Wasabi Mizuta). Doraemon took out the secret prop "Treasure Island Map", and Nobita found a new island with gold and silver treasures in the center of the Pacific Ocean by great coincidence. After that, the good friends set sail and headed towards the center of the Pacific Ocean. After the initial excitement of happiness wore off, a group of mysterious pirates stopped everyone. After a scuffle, Shizuka was snatched away by the other party as another girl. At the same time, Nobita and others rescued Flock (voiced by Yamashita Daiki), a boy from the island.
                                    
                                In order to rescue Shizuka, they followed the pirates' tracks and crossed the vast sea...

title: Anna Karenina Anna Karenina
leader: ['Keira Knightley', 'Jude Law', 'Michelle Dockery', 'Kelly Macdonald', 'Aaron Taylor-Johnson', 'Emily Watson', 'Matthew Macfadyen', 'Olivia Williams', 'Ruth Wilson', 'Alicia Vikander', 'Domhnall Gleeson']
description:
In order to reconcile with her philandering brother Oblonsky (Matthew Macfadyen) and sister-in-law Dolly (Kelly Macdonald), whose marriage is on the verge of collapse, the beautiful lady Anna Karenina (Keira Knightley) takes a train to Moscow. She meets the cavalry officer Vronsky (Aaron Johnson) there. The latter is graceful, handsome and charming, which makes Dolly's sister Katie (Alicia Vikander) fascinated, and Anna, who is already a married woman, feels moved. Afraid of the gossip around her, Anna suppressed her inner emotions and returned to her home in Petersburg at night. Her husband, Alexander Karenin (Jude Law), who is obsessed with fame and fortune, seems completely unable to sympathize with his wife's depression. Before long, Vronsky followed to Petersburg, and Anna could no longer close the door to her heart full of love and desire...
                                        
                                    This film is adapted from the classic masterpiece of the same name by the writer Leo Tolstoy,...

title: spend spring
leader: ['Huang Yao', 'Sun Yang', 'Tang Jiawen', 'Ni Hongjie', 'Jiang Meiyi', 'Liao Qizhi', 'Jiao Gang']
description: Peipei (played by Huang Yao), a 16-year-old female student from a single-parent family, lives in both Hong Kong and Shenzhen. She goes to school in Hong Kong during the day and returns to Shenzhen to live with her mother (played by Ni Hongjie) at night, traveling frequently between the two places. In order to make an agreement to travel with her best friend Joe (played by Tong Jiawen), for her own sense of existence, and for her ignorant affection for Joe's boyfriend Ahao (played by Sun Yang), her inner impulse was ignited, and the "water guest" became her other identity, and a youth story with a sense of "adventure" began.

title: Limitless
leader: ['Bradley Cooper', 'Abbie Cornish', 'Robert De Niro', 'Andrew Howard', 'Anna Friel', 'Mei Tianyue', 'Johnny Whitworth']
description:
The film is adapted from Alan Grien's 2001 novel "Dark Fields", starring Bradley Cooper, who won the title of the World's Sexiest Man Alive in 2011.
                                    
                                The down-and-out Eddie Morley (Bradley Cooper) is a writer who has lost his job and lacks inspiration. His ex-brother-in-law, whom he had not contacted for a long time, gave him a drug that was in the experimental stage - NZT. After taking it once, Eddie found that he was energetic, clear in thinking and quick in action. He could even recombine and organize some details and information that were not easy to notice at ordinary times and draw inferences in an instant. When he went to find his brother-in-law again, he found that he had been murdered, the house was in a mess, and he was followed by a group of killers. After narrowly escaping death, Eddie finally discovered that this new drug called NZT allows people to use 100% of their brain's capabilities. With the help of NZT, Eddie regained his inspiration and entered the upper class, but his great success also had a fatal side effect: physical discomfort and uncontrollable emotions. At this time Eddie could no longer leave the drug, which led him into a dark field, and the killer was also watching him in the dark...

title: Evil does not suppress good
leader: ['Peng Yuyan', 'Liao Fan', 'Jiang Wen', 'Zhou Yun', 'Xu Qing', 'Zawatian Kenye', 'An Di', 'Shi Hang', 'Li Meng', 'Ding Jiali', 'Chen Xi']
description:
On the eve of the July 7th Incident, young Chinese-American Hendler (played by Eddie Peng) traveled across the ocean from the United States and returned to Peking, where he had been away for more than ten years, to practice medicine. However, his real name is Li Tianran. When he was thirteen years old, he witnessed his master's family being exterminated by his senior brother Zhu Qianlong (played by Liao Fan) and the Japanese Neichiro (played by Sawada Kenya). Tian Tian, ​​who had a lucky escape, was sent to the other side of the ocean by the American Doctor Hendler and received extremely rigorous training. Now he sets foot on his homeland with a top-secret mission. Hendler and his son rent the house of a mysterious man named Lan Qingfeng (played by Jiang Wen). Lan was a participant in the Revolution of 1911. He had a close relationship with Zhu Qianlong, now the police chief, but he secretly encouraged Zhu to get rid of Genichiro by killing Li Tianran as a bargaining chip. The revengeful Li Tianran found his enemy, while Dr. Hendler tried his best to prevent his adopted son from taking risks. In this process, the social butterfly Tang Fengyi (played by Xu Qing) and the tailor Guan Qiaohong (played by Zhou Yun) are also involved in the whirlpool of men's intrigues. Until the July 7th Incident broke out, all the contradictions ushered in the moment of decision...
                                    
                                This film is adapted from Zhang Beihai's novel "Xia Yin".

title: What's wrong with Kevin? We Need to Talk About Kevin
leader: ['Tilda Swinton', 'John C. Reilly', 'Ezra Miller', 'Ashley Gerasimovich', 'Sifon Fallon', 'Joseph Melendez', 'Leslie Lyles', 'Lauren Fox', 'Suzette Gunn']
description:
Eva (Tilda Swinton) is a professional woman who dreams of traveling around the world, but her sudden marriage and unexpected pregnancy caused her to give up her ideals and become a housewife. However, her sacrifice only resulted in disappointment. Kevin (Jasper Newell) has not been a worry-free child since he was a child. He cries endlessly and is indifferent to his mother's care. For such a child, Eva inevitably gives up on herself. Soon, the birth of a little girl broke the deadlock. Unfortunately, the little girl was born aphasic. This tragic experience made Eva pour all her love into her.
                                    
                                As an adult, Kevin (Ezra Miller) is farther and farther away from his mother, but he is quite close to his father. He likes archery, so his father gave him a bow and arrow. Unexpectedly, it was this bow and arrow that brought a devastating blow to the family and the entire society. What happened to Kevin? No one could answer. Even Kevin himself could only remain silent when faced with such a question.

title: The Walk in the Clouds

description:
Philip Pat (Joseph Gordon-Levitt), who has had a talent for acrobatics since childhood, meets the beautiful street music girl Anne (Charlotte Le Bon) while performing on the street. By chance, Philip learned that the Twin Towers of the World Trade Center in New York were about to be completed. From then on, Philip came up with the idea of ​​walking a tightrope between the two skyscrapers. However, this crazy "art crime" encountered a series of doubts and misunderstandings, but this did not defeat Philip's firm belief. He conducted in-depth investigations and careful deployment, and received the guidance of Rudy's father (Ben Kingsley), who is experienced in tightrope walking, and the help of Jean-Louis (Clement Sibony) and Jeff (César Domboy). In the 110th layer and 412 meters of clouds, Philip began his tightrope walk.
                                        
                                    This film is adapted from the personal autobiography of French acrobatic artist Philippe Parte, and is a remake of the 2009 Oscar-winning best documentary film...

title: Gods of Egypt: Eye of Power
leader: ['Nikolaj Coster-Waldau', 'Brenton Thwaites', 'Gerard Butler', 'Chadwick Boseman', 'Ellodie Yuan', 'Courtney Eaton', 'Rufus Sewell', 'Geoffrey Rush', 'Bryan Brown', 'Rachel Black', 'Emma Booth', 'Goran D. Klut', 'Abbey Leigh', 'Bruce Spence', 'Robin Nevin']
description:
The story takes place on the prosperous Nile, under the peaceful rule of the god Horus (Nikolaj Coster-Waldau), the people live and work in peace and harmony. However, the good times did not last long. The evil God of Darkness, Set (Gerard Butler), used conspiracy to seize Horus's throne and eyes, expelled him from prison, and was cruel and warlike by nature. Soon, the whole country fell into chaos.
                                    
                                Baker (Brenton Thwaites) is just an ordinary human thief, but he unexpectedly becomes the only hope of saving mankind. In order to fight against the powerful Seth, he found Horus all the way and asked him for help. In this way, the strange combination of one person and one god was established. In order to regain his power, Horus must regain his eyes. With this goal, the group embarked on a journey.

title: The Imitation Game The Imitation Game

Truman']
description:
During World War II, the Allies suffered from the inability to decipher the German secret system "Ingmar". The government convened a group of private mathematicians and logicians to carry out secret cracking work. Turing (Benedict Cumberbatch) was one of them. At the beginning of the project, Turing was rejected by the team members and leaders headed by Hugh (Matthew Goode). Fortunately, Minister of Military Intelligence Menzies (Mark Strong) helped him establish a machine to decipher codes, and Turing became the person in charge, recruiting a new member Joan (Keira Knightley) to start the difficult work. Joan soon became obsessed with Turing. Due to her help, all team members united unprecedentedly and successfully cracked the German code two years later. Turing was once engaged to Joan, but in fact he hid a secret, because of which he also suffered inhuman treatment...
                                    
                                This film was adapted from "The Life of Alan Turing" written by Andrew Hodges. After its release, it won the 87th Academy Award for Best Adapted Screenplay.

title: Detective Conan: Tang Hong’s Love Song

On a sunny day, Conan (voiced by Takayama Minami), Xiaolan (voiced by Yamazaki Kazana) and their partners from the Young Detective Team accompanied Mouri Kogoro (voiced by Oyama Rikiya) to Osaka to participate in the local "High School Satsuki Cup" 100-person Japanese song contest. During this period, they also met each other's friends Hattori Heiji (voiced by Ryo Horikawa) and Toyama Kazuha (voiced by Miyamura Yuko). In the middle of the game, an explosion warning letter was sent to the TV station, and the police acted quickly to organize an evacuation. Halfway through the evacuation, an explosion suddenly occurred, resulting in Heiji and Kazuha being trapped in the building. After a series of chaos, the body of a person related to the Satsuki Cup suddenly appeared in front of everyone. The confusing case once again attracted Conan's attention...
                                    
                                This film is adapted from the popular manga by Gosho Aoyama and is the 21st film version of the "Detective Conan Series".

title: crime city 범죄도시
leader: ['Ma Dong-seok', 'Yoon Kye-sang', 'Jo Jae-yoon', 'Choi Kyu-hwa', 'Lim Hyung-jun', 'Jin Sun-kyu', 'Hong Ki-joon', 'Heo Dong-won', 'Ha-jun', 'Kim Sung-kyu', 'Park Ji-hwan', 'Heo Sung-tae', 'Min Kyung-jin', 'Yoon Byung-hee', 'Lee Sang-won', 'Jung In-ki', 'Uhm Ji-sung', 'Baek In-kwon', 'Bae Jin-woong', 'Han Seong-cheon', 'Kim Jiu-taek', 'Kim Ye-hung', 'Choi Sung-jae', 'Jo Jin-woong', 'Yoon-joo']

It is an emerging criminal organization headed by Zhang Chen (played by Yoon Kye-sang). Zhang Chen is known for his brutality and unscrupulousness. He does all kinds of evil for money, quickly threatening the original forces in various districts, and hoping to dominate South Korea. Seoul was plunged into a gang panic for a while. At this time, Ma Seok-do (played by Ma Dong-seok), a monster detective known for his iron fist and being able to deal with criminals in an entire district in one day. In order to clean up Seoul, which was invaded by underground forces, Seok-do launched a special operation and vowed to wipe out the Black Dragon Faction and give them the most painful blow.

title: Hotel Transylvania
leader: ['Adam Sandler', 'Andy Samberg', 'Selena Gomez', 'Kevin James', 'France Drescher', 'Steve Buscemi', 'Molly Shannon', 'David Spade', 'Chiloe Green', 'Jon Rawitz', 'Brian George', 'Lunelle Campbell', 'Brian Stack', 'Chris Parnell', 'Jackie Sandler', 'Sadie Sandler', 'Robert Smigel', 'Rob Riegel', 'Paul Britton', 'Jonny Solomon', 'Jim Wise', 'Craig Kelman', 'Brian McCann']
description:
Deep in the eerie and terrifying ghost forest, there stands a majestic and majestic castle. The owner here is the famous vampire Dracula (voiced by Adam Sandler). Different from the legend, Dracula is an extremely gentle and good father. He raised his daughter Mavis (voiced by Selena Gomez) alone. In order to protect his daughter from human harm, he specially built this castle called the Screaming Hotel, which is absolutely inaccessible to ordinary humans. Every year on Mavis's birthday, monsters such as Frankenstein, the Werewolf, the Mummy, and the Invisible Man come from all over the world to celebrate the little girl's birthday. On the occasion of Mavis's 118th birthday, she was eager to see the outside world. Dracula, who was well prepared, set up a trap, but accidentally introduced the human teenager Jonathan (voiced by Andy Samberg) into the castle.
                                    
                                The arrival of Jonathan seemed to bring a new breath to the monster world, and Count Dracula had to go to great lengths to hide the truth that he was human...

title: Guan Yunchang
leader: ['Donnie Yen', 'Jiang Wen', 'Sun Li', 'Fang Zhongxin', 'Li Zonghan', 'Zhao Ke', 'Wang Xuebing', 'Qian Xiaohao', 'Shao Bing', 'Dong Yong', 'Wang Baijie']
description: In the chaos of the late Eastern Han Dynasty, Liu Bei's two wives and a concubine Qilan (played by Sun Li) were trapped in Cao Ying. Guan Yunchang (played by Donnie Yen) surrendered to Cao Cao (played by Jiang Wen) to preserve his loyalty. However, he still could not forgive Cao Cao's wolf ambition to control the Han Dynasty and hoped to return to Liu Bei's side. Cao Cao admired Guan Yu's general talents and benevolent heart, and tried to persuade the latter with the interests of the people of the world. At the same time as Yuan Shao launched an army to attack Cao Cao, Guan Yunchang killed Yan Liang in the formation, was granted the title of Hou Tinghou of the Han Dynasty, and formed a comradeship with Zhang Liao (played by Shao Bing). After Cao Cao repatriated the two Madame Lius, he added aphrodisiacs to Guan Yunchang's wine in order to make him have an unjust relationship with Qilan. Guan Yunchang used to have a secret affection for Qilan, a fellow villager, and even killed soldiers for her. This relationship was eventually blocked by the gift of his uncle and sister-in-law. After regaining consciousness, Guan Yunchang took Qilan to Liu Bei and broke through many obstacles along the way, leaving behind the eternal legend of "passing five levels and killing six generals"...

Dell couldn't find a job because he had a criminal record, so he came to take care of Phillip by mistake. The two people with completely different backgrounds experienced a series of hilarious stories and became a touching and inseparable acquaintance.

title: Angel Has Fallen Angel Has Fallen

description: The President of the United States (played by Morgan Freeman) was seriously injured and fell into a coma after a terrorist drone attack. His entourage was wiped out in multiple explosions. The only survivor, Mike Banning (played by Gerard Butler), the president's personal bodyguard for many years, became the biggest suspect and was accused by the FBI of attempting to assassinate the president. Banning must clear himself of his grievances and at the same time prevent the real plan to assassinate the president. Pursued by multiple forces, he has no choice but to seek the protection of a mysterious man... The once heroic bodyguard has now become a wanted criminal. How will Banning escape from danger, protect the president, and crack the conspiracy behind it?

title: Mom, don’t cry 돈 크라이 마미
leader: ['Yoo Sun', 'Nam Bora', 'Yoo Oseong', 'Shin Dongho', 'Kwon Hyun-sang']
description:
"Mom Don't Cry" is another Korean realism masterpiece after "The Melting Pot". It was shortlisted for the wide lens unit of the 17th Busan Film Festival.
                                    
                                This film is adapted from the cruel story of "a mother who learned that her daughter committed suicide because she was raped by male students personally avenged her daughter."
                                    
                                Yoo Lin (played by Yoo Sun), who had just divorced her husband and was about to start over, originally planned to start over with her only daughter Yoo Eun-ah (played by Nam Bora), who had just graduated from high school. The two lived a simple and peaceful life depending on each other. But misfortune fell from the sky, and Yinya chose to commit suicide on her birthday, which also destroyed Liu Lin's last spiritual pillar. One day, she learned the truth about her daughter's tragic death through Yinya's classmate Zhao Han (played by Shen Donghao): she was raped by many male classmates at school, but the perpetrators were exempted from punishment because of their status as minors. Unable to bear the consequences, Yinya chose to commit suicide. After that, Liu Lin suffered an unprecedented blow. She no longer believed in the law and decided to help her daughter avenge her revenge in any way, and drove her step by step towards an irreversible ending...

description: The film is adapted from the novel by Nathaniel Philbrick. The story tells the story of a real-life shipwreck experienced by the Essex whaling ship. In 1819, the ship sank in the South Pacific after being struck by a whale as big as the one described by Melville in "Moby Dick." The surviving sailors were crowded into three small boats and drifted on the sea for 90 days. During this period, they experienced illness and hunger, and eventually evolved into killing each other and cannibalism.

The new version of "The Mummy" tells a new story. The mummy princess Amanette travels to modern London in an attempt to recover everything that was taken away from her.

Sofia Boutella, the emerging actress who became popular for her role as "Blade" in "Kingsman", plays the mummy princess Armaette with great destructive power, while Russell Crowe, the famous Hollywood tough guy actor, also gave a wonderful performance.
                                    
                                Director Alex Kurtzman is a veteran Hollywood producer. His works include "Now You See Me", "Star Trek Into Darkness", "Mission: Impossible 3", etc.
                                    
                                It is reported that the film will release the world's first official trailer in the near future, where more exciting scenes will be presented and more mysterious plots will be revealed. The film is expected to be released in North America on June 9, 2017.

title: The Back-Up Plan

description: After years of searching for true love but failing to find one, an older woman named Zoe (Jennifer Lopez) decides to change her life by giving birth to a child. On the day of artificial insemination, she encounters Stan (Alex O'Loughlin), a "car snatcher" on the street. Stan's humor and romance seemed to fit all of Zoe's fantasies about a significant other, but unfortunately, through artificial insemination, Zoe really became pregnant. When encountering true love, the news of successful pregnancy undoubtedly becomes a time bomb. Zoe doesn't know whether the man in front of her can accept it. Full of anxiety, Zoe told Stan about her pregnancy. Fortunately, Stan finally chose to stay with her. However, Stan's heart is still full of uneasiness about the new life that is coming...

title: Detective Pu Songling

description:
Pu Songling (Jackie Chan), who lives in seclusion in the mountains and old forests, is not only a writer with outstanding literary talent, but also a master of catching monsters with unique skills. During a jewelry theft case, Pu Songling met Yan Fei (played by Lin Bohong), a rookie detective in Jinhua County. After that, Yan Fei, who was brought up by the yamen, came to the mountain and begged to become Pu Songling's teacher. title: Turn around the mountain

description:

On the fifth day, they came to Deqin, and Li Xiaochuan was frustrated because he missed the opportunity to see the Thirteen Peaks of Meili in the clouds and mist; on the sixth day, they stayed in a Tibetan home in Yanjing, and the scholar and the simple Tibetan people said goodbye; on the seventh day, they were walking hard on the mountain road in Quzika, and Li Xiaochuan accidentally fell off a cliff and was seriously injured. Tired of the same boring life every day, Shaun the Sheep decided to make some changes. He incited his companions to participate in his plan, luring away the dog Bitzer and hypnotizing the farmer. Bitzer ordered the sheep and goats to return to the farm, while he ran to rescue the farmer in panic. The farmer finally woke up and couldn't figure out what happened. description:
On Christmas Eve, the weather was extremely hot and the whole city was inexplicably weird. The high-load operating power station is full of dangers, and the fire department is keeping a close watch. The firefighters' respective concerns made this "tough battle" full of emotional entanglements.
                                        
                                    Ho Yongsen (Nicholas Tse), You Bangchao (Shawn Shawn), and Ye Zhihui (Andy On) have been brothers for ten years, but now they have their own concerns: He Yongsen, who was deeply appreciated, was transferred from the fire station, and he was unwilling to do so; Ye Zhihui played with interpersonal relationships and was promoted the fastest; You Bangchao was free and easy-going, not burdened by people, but encountered a rough marriage. The secret of betrayal among the three brothers makes the relationship even more tense. At the same time, mainland super firefighter Haiyang (played by Hu Jun) comes to report. As a "recruit" of the Hong Kong Fire Department, he encounters overt and covert difficulties from "veteran" Mr. Pei (played by Simon Yam), and he himself has an unsolvable knot.
                                        
                                    The crisis finally came, and the power station exploded and caught fire, plunging Hong Kong into unprecedented darkness. There are even a group of people trapped in the sea of ​​​​fire, their lives hanging on a thread. Firefighters walked into a dark environment where they couldn't see their fingers, fighting against the deadly smoke. They had to save people, but also had to deal with sibling struggles, and orders from the top of the team to ensure safety flashed from time to time. after all...

title: Demon police

Wang Weiye (played by Daniel Wu), who has been in the police for 17 years, is extremely uneasy due to childhood and family reasons. On the other hand, Weiye's mental condition became even more worrying. He refused to receive psychological counseling and pursued Han Jiang's accomplices like a ghost.

The small late-night cafeteria welcomes people who are tired from running around in this noisy city. Scott (Michael Cera), a rock and roll young man who dreams of becoming a singer, has a band, several buddies and an unbearable relationship. Just when he was pessimistic and fell into a deep emotional shadow and couldn't extricate himself, high school girl Naifus Zhou (played by Ellen Wong) and his dream lover Ramona Flowers (Mary Elizabeth Winstead) appeared in front of him at the same time. Scott fell in love with Hua at first sight, but what he didn't expect was that he had to defeat seven of her evil ex-boyfriends before he could win Hua's heart. title: The Last Witch Hunter The Last Witch Hunter

Calder (Vin Diesel) is a witch hunter. Under the curse of the Black Witch, he received an immortal soul and an immortal body. The pain of eternal life is far greater than the joy. Finally one day, humans declared war on the increasing number of vampires and wolf clans. These two groups were massively encircled, suppressed and massacred, and humans gained an absolute advantage. When she woke up again, she found that she was imprisoned by an institution called the Antigen Institute, numbered Experimental Subject No. 1.                                 In this strange era, Selina is destined to continue to live a bloody life...

At an art auction held in Manhattan, the United States, Van Gogh's handwritten copy of the Sunflower Series No. 2 painting, which was once thought to have been destroyed by air raids in World War II, made a stunning appearance. Suzuki Jirokichi (voiced by Tomita Gengsheng), a consultant to the wealthy Suzuki Consortium, took the opportunity to acquire it at a sky-high price of US$300 million. When she is about to graduate from college, the beautiful female student Kaori (voiced by Mirai Kataoka) makes an appointment with her friends Erika (voiced by Taniguchi Anru) and Noriko (voiced by Saeki Miku), and leaves Tokyo for Okinawa, planning to stay at the villa of her boyfriend Azada (voiced by Negishi Takuma) uncle for a graduation trip. In 2023, the "Human Clearance Plan" implemented by the new U.S. government will enter its sixth year. The extreme and unconventional policies were aimed at curbing the rising unemployment and crime rates. During this period, more and more innocent people were killed, while the wealthy poured their glasses of wine, admired and even participated in the annual carnival of massacres in a seemingly noble and elegant manner. The bustling metropolis Tokyo, Japan, ushered in the annual April Fool's Day. Hospital cleaner Nitta Ayumu (played by Erika Toda), who has communication difficulties, mustered up the courage to call surgeon Geng Makino (played by Tori Matsuzaka) to announce the fact that she was pregnant. Unexpectedly, the other party denied that the child was related to him, and even regarded it as a bad joke, and then continued to attract bees and butterflies. In a rage, Nitta went to the Italian restaurant where Makino was, causing chaos that was difficult to end. Over there, Sakurakoji and his wife (Kotaro Satomi & Junko Tomi), who claim to be a royal family, visited Tokyo under the guidance of a taxi driver (Kenichi Takifuji) and spent their rare time together. Hong Kong in the 1960s was in a state of rapid change. On the one hand, they have to endure the repression of the British Hong Kong government, on the other hand they are affected by the movements in the mainland, and they have to face typhoons and storms that land from time to time. The time-honored Wynn Street is at the center of such a storm.
                                        
                                    Shoemaker Luo's family of four makes a living by making shoes at the end of the street. Mr. Luo (played by Simon Yam) is a good shoemaker and can only support his family in that chaotic era; Mrs. Luo (played by Sandra Ng) is a spicy and straightforward person, known as the "Sister-in-law Luo". The eldest son Luo Jinyi (played by Li Zhiting) is 16 years old. He has excellent academic performance and is the champion of the sports meeting. He has a naughty nature and is famous for being naughty and tricky... The family is living a difficult life, but it is also a happy life.
                                        
                                    However, a pure first love between the eldest son and a wealthy girl Fang Fei (played by Cai Yingen), a hurricane that swept across Hong Kong, and a long-awaited nightmare suddenly changed the peace and happiness of this ordinary family overnight... Disappointed with the stupidity and corruption of the police, McCall was determined to stand up and fight the system.

On this day, the beautiful Duke's youngest daughter Milla (Mariya Poezzhaeva) is about to hold a grand wedding. The wedding was about to be held again.
