Gary King (Simon Pegg), who is overly addicted to alcohol and is in his prime, suddenly remembers a proud but unfinished debauchery in his youth 20 years ago, so he successively finds good partners Oliver Chamberlain (Martin Freeman), Peter Page (Eddie Marsan), Steven Prince (Paddy Considine) who now have their own families and careers. ) and Andy Knightley (Nick Frost). They met to return to their hometown of Newtonhaven, trying to regain the happy time of five people, 12 bars, and 60 beers all night long. The town remains the same as before, with almost no changes, but the people in the town seem not to remember these old boys at all.
                                    
                                Under Gary's guidance, everything was relatively normal at first, but when night fell, strange events took place alternately. Gary and others discovered that they seemed to have unknowingly stepped into some kind of supernatural trap...

title: In this corner of the world, この世の片summer

description:
Xiaoling (voiced by Rena Nonen) is a girl who spends her days in a daze. Her biggest hobby is painting. Seeing that it was time to get married, under the arrangement of her parents, Xiaoling came to Kure City, married a man named Hojo Shusaku (voiced by Hosoya Yoshimasa), and became the daughter-in-law of the Hojo family.
                                    
                                Kyouko (voiced by Omi Meiji) is Shuzuo's sister, and she lives back with her parents' family with her daughter Harumi (voiced by Inaba Natsuki). Unlike the virtuous and honest Xiaoling, Jingzi has a flamboyant and aggressive personality. Although she is often dissatisfied with the submissive Xiaoling, the relationship between the two is actually very good. The war has begun, and more and more fighter jets fly through the sky. The piercing air defense sirens often break the tranquility of the night. The shadow of war covers the life of the Hojo family bit by bit. In an air raid, Harumi was unfortunately killed, and Xiaoling also lost her right hand and could no longer paint. However, in such a cruel situation, the family still did not give up their desire for survival.

title: love announcement

description:
Although the pop star Du Minghan (played by Wang Leehom) is famous and in the limelight, the emptiness in his heart is increasing day by day, and the tree of love has been delayed in bearing fruit. In a car accident, he met Song Xiaoqing (played by Liu Yifei), a girl from the Folk Music Department of Shanghai Conservatory of Music. Ming and Han were attracted by Xiaoqing's otherworldly temperament, and were even more moved by her exquisite piano music. After that, he and his orchestra partner and friend Wei Zhibai (played by Chen Handian) disguised themselves and sneaked into the conservatory. During this period, the two, Song Xiaoqing and Tao Li (played by Zeng Yike) formed a four-person band to participate in the school's performance. Minghan also helped Xiaoqing pursue Mu Fan (played by Qiao Zhenyu), a talented person from the folk music department, and made many jokes during the period. Taking off the hypocrisy of the prosperous world, Minghan returned to his youthful and innocent campus and received the most rare gift in life...
                                    
                                This film is Leehom Wang’s directorial and starring debut.

title: Winnie the Pooh Winnie the Pooh
leader: ['John Cleese', 'Jim Cummings', 'Bud Lucky', 'Craig Ferguson', 'Jack Bolt', 'Travis Oates', 'Kristin Anderson Lopez', 'Wilter Dean Hall', 'Tom Kenny', 'Hugh Hauser', 'Lisa Lind', 'Robert Lopez']
description:
One day, Winnie the Pooh (voiced by Jim Cummings) woke up from his sleep and found that he had run out of honey. So he walked into the Hundred Acre Wood to find honey. On the way, he met the sad donkey Eeyore (dubbed by Bud Luckey). It turned out that Eeyore had lost his tail. Pooh then invited Tigger, Rabbit Rabbit, Owl, Kangaroo Mother and Bean to help. Robin proposed a competition. Whoever helps Eeyore find a replacement for his tail first will win a jar of fresh honey. Everyone tried their best to find all kinds of tails, but none of them could make Eeyore happy. The next day, Pooh went to Robin for help and found a note hanging on the door saying "Go out for a while and be back soon." Everyone with limited literacy thought Robin had been kidnapped, and organized a rescue operation in panic. However, at this time, Pooh could no longer stand the hunger that was coming...
                                    
                                This film is adapted from three stories in the book by A. A. Milne, the original author of Winnie the Pooh.

title: Captain Fantastic

description: Isolated deep in the forests of the Pacific Northwest, a loving father devoted himself to raising his six young children into outstanding adults. But when disaster strikes, they are forced to leave the paradise they created and begin to move toward the outside world. This not only challenged his understanding of the role of "parent", but also made the children begin to doubt everything their father taught them.

title: The Square The Square
leader: ['Clas Bang', 'Elisabeth Moss', 'Dominic West', 'Terry Notary', 'Christopher Letso', 'Marina Shippenko']
description:
After Christian (Claes Bang) divorced his wife, he started a new life with his young daughter (Lilianne Mardon). Christian works as a curator in an art gallery. Recently, he is planning an installation exhibition called "Square", hoping to promote a positive concept of equality and mutual help for everyone.
                                    
                                In an accident, Christian's cell phone was stolen. Using GPS positioning, Christian found the apartment where the thief lived. Late at night, Christian stuffed a charge sheet into the door cracks of every household in the building. Little did he know that this thoughtless move would cause him big trouble. In order to promote the exhibition, Christian hired an agent from a media public relations company. Unexpectedly, these two unreliable men soon turned the exhibition into a mess. Misfortunes never come singly, and a romantic relationship between Christian and female journalist Anne (Elisabeth Moss) causes Anne to launch a fierce offensive against him.

title: gold heist
leader: ['Lei Jiayin', 'Tao Hong', 'Cheng Yuanyuan', 'Yamazaki Keiichi', 'Guo Tao', 'Fan Wei', 'Sun Chun', 'Liu Hua', 'Huang Bo', 'Yue Xiaojun', 'Fu Heng', 'Wang Wen', 'Yang Xinming']
description:
During the Manchukuo period, the situation was turbulent. The Kwantung Army was like a wolf and a tiger, and the revolutionary organization National Salvation Congress moved with the camera. Under this seemingly clear sky, an unemployed young man nicknamed Xiao Dongbei (played by Lei Jiayin) wanders the streets and alleys, deceiving and abducting to get by. By chance, he accidentally learned a secret. The Kwantung Army would send a batch of gold to the closely guarded Daiwa Bank. Members of the National Salvation Association, headed by the actress Fang Die (played by Xiao Taohong), decided to seize the gold and thereby prevent the Japanese plan to purchase arms from Italy. For gold's sake. Xiao Dongbei is shameless and wants to get in the way. Although he succeeded repeatedly with his cleverness, he also brought a lot of trouble to Fangdie and others. And their opponent, Kwantung Army Colonel Toriyama Konosuke (played by Yamazaki Keiichi), is insidious and cunning, becoming their biggest obstacle.
                                    
                                Can the plan to seize gold finally succeed?

title: War Horse War Horse
leader: ['Jeremy Irvine', 'Peter Mullan', 'Emily Watson', 'Benedict Cumberbatch', 'Tom Hiddleston', 'David Thewlis', 'Niels Agostup', 'Celine Bunkins', 'David Cross', 'Toby Kebbell', 'Patrick Kennedy']
description: In 1914, in a small town in Devon, the boy Albert (Jeremy Irvine) witnessed the birth of the colt Joey. At the market, it was frequently bid for price, and was eventually pocketed by Albert's father Ted (Peter Mullan) for a sky-high price of 30 guineas. The lame man also offended the landlord. Albert and Joey had fun and shared it with their friends. However, the good times did not last long. The landowner came to visit and said that if Joey could not plow the land, he would be taken away immediately, so Ted gambled all his property. So, under coercion, Albert put a saddle on Joey, forced him to plow the ground, and even used a whip, but he couldn't make him surrender. In order to repay the debt, Ted personally plowed the fields, and his hard work paid off, and the hard work paid off, but a heavy rain ruined everything. When the German army attacked, my father was forced to sell his horse to the cavalry army for 30 guineas. Although Albert couldn't let go, he could only bid farewell to Joey with tears and embark on the battlefield with an uncertain future. During the war, Joey's owners kept changing, from a British captain, a French farmer and his granddaughter, to a German cavalryman. However, what he was really waiting for was Albert...

title: Captain Phillips Captain Phillips

description:
In 2009, the American freighter "Maersk Alabama", led by Captain Richard Philip (played by Tom Hanks), performed a cargo transportation mission in the Horn of Africa. The route of this mission passes through the waters of Somalia where piracy is rampant. Although Captain Philip and the crew had conducted anti-pirate training and exercises, they did not expect to be attacked by four Somali pirates boarding the ship shortly after setting off. Captain Philip was unfortunately taken hostage by pirates and taken away from the cargo ship while fighting to protect the crew and cargo. After receiving the intelligence, the U.S. Navy and other departments immediately launched a large-scale rescue operation to rescue Captain Phillips.
                                    
                                This film is adapted from real events. This is the first time in nearly 200 years that a U.S. ship has been hijacked by pirates.

title: Hunter Wind River

Under the involvement of a murder case, they gradually entered the fog of human struggle. As more layers of identities and complex connections were revealed, the dangerous situation of the characters gradually escalated, becoming increasingly tense and intense, and the core of the case gradually emerged.

title: forever

description:
The film tells the story of two families who share weal and woe and are forced to become estranged due to a hidden accident. They experience pain and anxiety under the torrent of the times, and the ups and downs of their lives. They finally choose to face the truth and move forward magnanimously.
                                    
                                The young Liu Yaojun and Shen Yingming families were close friends. While their sons Shen Hao and Liu Xing were playing in the suburbs, Yaojun's son Liu Xing died unexpectedly. This incident completely changed the fate of the two families. The Liu family and his wife went to the south. Many years later, they meet again with their old faces, and the hidden truth will eventually be revealed due to the magnanimity of the younger generation. Years pass and life rolls forward...

Arisugawa Tetsuko (voiced by Yu Aoi), a girl studying in junior high school, transferred to Ishinomori Academy because her parents divorced. What made her a little frustrated was that her classmates all looked at her strangely and even stayed away from her. I learned from my classmate Mumi that the former owner of the table where Tetsuko was sitting was once involved in a murder case called "Judas and his four wives." There is another table behind that table, and its owner Hana Arai (voiced by Suzuki Anzu) has been absent from school for a long time. Hana is also Tetsuko's current neighbor. In order to find out the truth about the murder, Tetsuko, who named herself "Alice", boldly entered Hana's house and learned various past events about "Judas".
                                    
                                Taking this as an opportunity, these two girls with somewhat eccentric but clever and lovely personalities began their great friendship...

(Technological Hierarchy for the Removal of Undesirables and the Subjugation of Humanity)

description:
Ling MuYuanZi's uncle Jiro was unwilling to fail and decided to challenge Kaitou Kidd again. This bad-tempered uncle spent a huge sum of money to build the giant spaceship Belle Shirley II, and bet a ring set with the precious gem "Lady of the Sky", inviting Kidd to challenge to see if he could complete this difficult task within the 6 hours from Tokyo to Osaka. title: A night of surprise

description:
Michelle (Fan Bingbing), a beautiful and capable girl who has excelled in essays since she was a child, has an excellent plan for life. Now, as the director of a large advertising planning company, her career is going smoothly and she is proud of herself. But just over a month ago, after her grand birthday party, Michelle unexpectedly discovered that she was pregnant. Everything points to the previous birthday party that was extremely carnival and drunken. Among the more than 50 men present, there are divorced diamond man company owner Zhou Bian (played by Daniel Henney), young subordinate Zhang Tongyu (played by Li Zhiting) who is in love with Michelle, strong and handsome godson Lin Zhibo (played by Jiang Jinfu) and upstart Lu Dahu (played by Liming) who made a fortune selling seafood sauce.
                                    
                                Under the guidance of her best friend Lin Weiwei (played by Wu Peici), Michelle faced the most ups and downs moment in her life at a loss...

title: Traces of Japanese pirates

description:
During the Wanli period, the world was at peace. In the early years, Japanese pirates were rampant, but fortunately the two generals Qi Jiguang and Yu Dayou pacified it, and finally achieved peace both internally and externally today. At this time, the martial arts world was dominated by four major families, and anyone trying to establish a sect must obtain the consent of the four major sects. One day, swords were everywhere in the city, and two mysterious men holding Japanese swords caused chaos in the martial arts world. At that time, Qi Jiguang understood the mystery from the way of holding the Japanese sword, so he improved the Japanese sword and used his own way to return it to the enemy, which made the Japanese pirates frightened. With the death of Qi Jiguang and the stability of the world, the Japanese swords of the Qi family gradually disappeared, and the martial arts in the Central Plains also denounced them as evil and refused to recognize them. These two people are the masters of the Qi family's military camp. They challenge the four major sects, hoping to clear the name of the Qi family's Japanese swordsmen.
                                    
                                Various martial arts sects simply rounded them up as Japanese pirates. Even Qiu Dongyue (played by Yu Chenghui), the top master of Shuangye City who had lived in seclusion in the mountains for many years, also went down the mountain to capture the thieves...

title: Rizhao Chongqing

Lin Quanhai (played by Wang Xueqi), a shipping captain who is over 50 years old, returned to his home in Chongqing after 14 years. He was so busy with his career that he suffered two failed marriages. While he was away, his 25-year-old son Lin Bo (played by Ziyi) was shot dead by the police on the spot for robbing and injuring others in a supermarket. For Lin Quanhai, this long-awaited city has too many changes that are difficult for him to understand. After that, he successively visited his ex-wife Li Yuying (played by Ding Jiali), his friend Lao Jin (played by Wang Kuirong), Lao Jin's son Haozi (played by Qin Hao), female shop assistant Lingzi, the hostage taken hostage Zhuqing (played by Fan Bingbing), Lin Bo's girlfriend Xiaowen (played by Li Fei'er), and the detective Liu Cheng (translated by Zhang Jiayi) who shot Lin Bo ), just to see clearly his son’s true face and heart, as well as the emotional fragments lost after more than ten years...
                                    
                                This film is based on a real incident that happened in Chongqing.

title: While you are sleeping Mientras duermes

description:
The middle-aged Cesar (played by Luis Tosar) is the manager of a certain apartment building. During work, he works hard, greets every neighbor who passes by him, handles all affairs seriously, and occasionally helps residents take care of their puppies. During his break, he goes to the hospital to visit his mother, telling him about his experiences and knowledge of the day. However, Cesar, who seems to be honest and introverted, has an inhumane secret. Every night, he sneaks into the room of the young and beautiful female resident Clara (played by Marta Etura), uses drugs to make her fall into a deep sleep, and harasses her by sending all kinds of hot text messages every day. However, all this does not seem to be an almost crazy obsession, there is a deeper intention hidden behind his behavior. During this period, Clara's physical condition became worse and worse, and her life became a mess.
                                    
                                As his erratic behavior progresses, everything develops in an irreversible direction...

title: Resident Evil: The Curse

description:
In 1991, the Soviet Union collapsed, and the socialist countries that were formerly part of the Soviet system declared independence one after another. The East Slavic Republic was one of the many new countries. However, East Slavia was severely polarized and the society was seriously imbalanced. The rebel forces and the government forces fought a war that lasted for more than ten years. As time entered the 21st century, the war between the two sides intensified. There were even rumors that "monsters" had joined in, and the war began to develop in an uncertain direction. In order to investigate the truth about biological and chemical weapons, Lyon was ordered to come to East Slavia. In the chaos, he was captured by the rebels, but humans controlled by parasites quickly attacked their habitats and cities. At the same time, Ada also came to East Slavia with a mysterious purpose. The war destroys everything and nourishes the devil. Can Lyon prevent the situation from deteriorating further...
                                    
                                This film is adapted from the classic video game of the same name.

description:
A highly decomposed body was discovered in an apartment in Katsushika Ward, Tokyo. After preliminary investigation by the police, the deceased was Michiko Oshitani from Shiga Prefecture, and her death was indeed a homicide. Detective Matsunomiya (Junpei Mizohata) of the Metropolitan Police Department’s Investigation Section 1 discovered that Oshitani was here to visit and watch a stage play by Hiromi Asai (Nanako Matsushima), a friend from his student days. Although Asai has a sufficient alibi, her photo with Kaga Kyouichiro (played by Hiroshi Abe) still attracted Matsugiya's attention. At the same time, a burned body was discovered near the apartment where Daozi was killed. A relic at the scene made Jiahe extremely excited, because it was inextricably related to his mother, whom he had not seen for many years. The two cases and the missing people connected Qianju and Kaga again...

title: Season of the Witch Season of the Witch

description: In the thirteenth century, priests had begun to use the Book of Solomon to combat witches and demons. One hundred years later, Knight Beman (Nicolas Cage), who became famous for his outstanding military exploits in the Crusades, and his old partner Filson (Ron Perlman) were tired of the cruelty of the war. The two disarmed and returned home, but what they saw in the town was a scene of raging plague. Beman and Filson were detained as deserters. The local lord knew about their merits and immediately entrusted them with the task of escorting a witch to the monastery for trial on behalf of the church. Beman, Field, a local priest, a knight, and a thief who served as a guide formed an escort team. The girl in the cage looks so unthreatening and innocent that Beiman cannot believe that she is the witch who brought the plague. Along the way, a young knight joined their team, but at the same time, inexplicable bloody visions also appeared repeatedly. When Beiman and his party arrived at the end, they finally discovered that it was all a conspiracy of the devil...

                                When the little boy Victor's pet dog Sparky was hit by a car and died, he was very sad. When he was in class at school, he had the idea to save his puppy when the teacher was doing an experiment on using electric shock to make the frog's nerves twitch. So at night, he caused thunder and lightning from the sky to shock the puppy's body and revive it. The reborn puppy frightened the boy's neighbors, who regarded the dog as a monster. When the neighbors chased the dog, they forced the dog and the boy into a cabin and nearly burned them to death. But the puppy rescued the boy and died himself. Neighbors and the boy's parents were moved and determined to save it again. They used car engines to generate electricity and saved the dog again...

(played by Mark Wahlberg)) to pay the ransom, the kidnappers who couldn't get the money frantically cut off the hostage's ears and mailed them to the Getty family. leader: ['Ivan Massagu', 'Zorion Iguiriol', 'Antonia San Juan', 'Emilio Buale', 'Alexandra Masanque', 'Mario Pardo', 'Argis Aloscas', 'Miriam Martin', 'Zihara Llana', 'Txubio Fernández de Jáuregui', 'Eric Goode', 'Óscar Oliver', 'Chema Trujillo', 'Gorka Zufiaurre', 'Miriam K. Martxante']
description:
In a dystopian future, prisoners are housed in cells stacked vertically, watching hungrily as food falls from the upper levels, leaving those near the top well-fed and those at the bottom radicalized by hunger.
                                    
                                Directed by Gard Gastelou-Urushia, Hungry Platform is a twisted social fable about the darkest and hungriest side of humanity.

title: Female spy Spy
leader: ['Melissa McCarthy', 'Jason Statham', 'Jude Law', 'Rose Byrne', 'Morena Baccarin', 'Lee Wynn', 'Allison Janney', 'Bobby Cannavale', '50 Cent', 'Peter Serafinowicz', 'Carlos Pons', 'Zach Woods', 'Jessica Chaffin', 'Miranda Hart', 'Alicia Vera-Bailey', 'Nagis Fakli']
description: Susan (Melissa McCarthy) is a little-known logistician for the CIA who specializes in assisting in dangerous missions. Her partner Bradley (Jude Law) suddenly disappeared during an operation, which also affected the safety of another top CIA agent Rick (Jason Statham). In order to find out the whereabouts of her partner and save this precarious world, Susan volunteered to act as an undercover agent and infiltrated into the most dangerous arms dealer group in history, trying to find out the truth of the matter and matching wits with the leader of the femme fatale beauty (Rose Byrne). However, during the thrilling process of heroic rescue, Susan discovered that things were not as simple as she imagined...

title: Crazy Alien Home
leader: ['Jim Parsons', 'Rihanna', 'Steve Martin', 'Jennifer Lopez', 'Matt Jones', 'Brian Stepanik', 'April Lawrence', 'Stephen Kelling', 'Lisa Stewart', 'April Winchell']
description:
The Bobo Stars at the other end of the universe could not bear the invasion of the Guar Stars, so they moved away from home and regarded the blue earth as their new settlement. Under the command of their leader, the Bobo Stars expelled humans to a specially built settlement in Australia, and they also called it peaceful coexistence with humans. Gretuty Tucci, a girl nicknamed "Tip", was the only one arrested in the city. She missed her mother who was captured, so she drove with her cat to find her mother's whereabouts. On the way, Tip met Xiao Ou, a Popo star. Xiao Ou is a troublemaker that his fellow tribesmen are afraid to avoid. Not long ago, he used the device in his hand to send invitations to the housewarming party. Unexpectedly, one of the group messages was sent to the Guar Star people. As a result, he was regarded as a traitor by his peers and was hunted down.
                                    
                                A similar encounter put Xiao Fei and Xiao Ou in the same car, and they embarked on a thrilling journey. During the process, they learned the reason why the Guar Stars were chasing the Bobo Stars...

title: Mamma Mia! Here We Go Again
leader: ['Lily James', 'Amanda Seyfried', 'Julie Waters', 'Christine Baranski', 'Pierce Brosnan', 'Stellan Skarsgård', 'Colin Firth', 'Dominic Cooper', 'Jeremy Irvine', 'Alexa Davis', 'Jessica Keenan Wynn', 'Josh Dylan', 'Hugh Skinner', 'Cher', 'Meryl Streep', 'Andy Garcia', 'Celia Imrie', 'Omid Giarelli', 'Gerard Monaco', 'Naoko Mori', 'Togo Ikawa', 'Anastasia Hill', 'Suzanne Barclay', 'Jonathan Goldsmith', 'Kathy Clare', 'Benny Anderson', 'Dale Branston', 'Alexandra Ford']
description:
"Mamma Mia 2" is produced by Universal Pictures and is the sequel to the 2008 musical comedy film "Mamma Mia". The original cast of the first film will all return, and the stage play adaptation in the film will be based on songs by the famous Swedish band ABBA.
                                    
                                The sequel will revolve around the young love story of Sophie (played by Amanda Seyfried) and her mother Donna (played by Meryl Streep) - the pregnant Sophie has always questioned whether she can raise a child alone until she learns about Donna's experience of raising her alone, and is greatly inspired. Young Donna will be played by Lily James, and Cher will also appear in the film, playing Sophie's grandmother Ruby.

title: The journey of autism Temple Grandin
leader: ['Claire Danes', 'Julia Ormond', 'Catherine O'Hara', 'David Strathairn', 'Barry Tubb', 'Melissa Farman', 'Sheramie Lee', 'Charles Baker', 'Blair Bomar']
description:
This film is adapted from the personal autobiography of Trimble Grandin (Claire Danes), an American animal scientist and doctor of animal husbandry who has suffered from autism since childhood. It tells the story of Trimble's unique growth experience.
                                    
                                When Tianbao was four years old, he was diagnosed with autism by a doctor. His mother tried various methods to get Tianbao to speak. In order to let Tianbao have a normal life, her mother reluctantly sent her to a boarding school. Here, Tianbao met her mentor Dr. Carlock, who opened the door to her talent. With the help of his mentor, Tianbao was successfully admitted to university. During the summer vacation before going to college, Tianbao went to his aunt's farm for vacation. Since then, Tianbao has developed a keen interest in livestock. In college Trimble built a "squeeze machine" to calm his nerves. After graduation, Tianbao continued to engage in research and study in animal husbandry and designed a more humane slaughtering method that greatly improved the slaughter rate. Tianbao understands the world in her unique way, "thinking like an animal", and spoke out loud about her personal experience at an autism seminar...

title: Goodbye in heaven Au revoir là-haut
leader: ['Nahuel Pérez Biscaiat', 'Albert Dupontel', 'Roland Lafayette', 'Niels Agostup', 'Emily De Guin', 'Melanie Thierry', 'Héloïse Balst', 'Philippe Uzen', 'André Marcon', 'Michel Viermo', 'Cain Kojadi', 'Philippe Duxner']
description: "Goodbye" directed and starred by French actor Alberto Ponty, who is both an actor and an excellent director, is adapted from the novel of the same name by the master of crime novels Pierre Maître. It tells the story of two soldiers who were brutally punished for witnessing a crime committed by their commander. Unexpectedly, after they retired, their commander became prosperous, but they themselves were penniless. In order to prevent the villain from succeeding, they decided to seek justice for themselves. The film brilliantly depicts French society after the First World War, from the muddy battlefields filled with blood and flesh to the gorgeous parties of lavish entertainment, but even the gorgeous masks cannot hide the pain of life behind them.

title: Sanhuo
leader: ['Zeng Meihuizi', 'Chen Zhanwen', 'Chen Wanlei', 'Mai Qiang', 'Deng Yueping']
description: This film is the last part of Hong Kong director Chen Guo's prostitute trilogy ("Durian", "Hong Kong's Hollywood"). This film tells the story of a peculiar prostitute living on a boat in Hong Kong. She had an extraordinary sexual appetite and three husbands, and she devoted herself entirely to her work. Using sex to satirize the times, the film is full of lust.

title: Natsume's Book of Friends The Movie Natsume's Book of Friends ~うつせみに knotぶ~
leader: ['Kamiya Hiroshi', 'Inoue Kazuhiko', 'Kora Kengo', 'Kobayashi Samae', 'Fujimura Ayumu', 'Murasase Ayumu', 'Ito Miki', 'Ito Eiji', 'Horie Kazuma', 'Sato Rina', 'Kimura Ryohei', 'Suganuma Hisayoshi', 'Miyuki Sawashiro', 'Ishida Akira', 'Yukino Satsuki', 'Kawasumi Ayako', 'Higuchi Akari', 'Okamura Akemi', 'Kuroda Takaya', 'Nagashima Yuichi', 'Matsuyama Takashi', 'Shimotsaki Hiroshi', 'Chitiri Kyoko', 'Takaoka Pase', 'Ochiai Fukuji', 'Kanada Akira', 'Takahashi Shinya', 'Matsukawa Yuki', 'Aimi', 'Tomatsu Kenya', 'Karari Aisa', 'Odagiri Akane', 'Mitani Ayako', 'Kotoge Eiji', 'Nishimura Mizuki', 'Hideyuki Hori', 'Shimamoto Sumi']
description: Natsume, who lives a busy life between people and monsters, accidentally reunited with her former classmate Yuuki, and recalled the bitter memories of being haunted by monsters. At this time, Natsume met the woman Tsumura Yoshie who appeared in the memory of the monster whose name was returned. She met Reiko and now lives a stable life with her only son Mukuo. Natsume's mood became calmer through communicating with them. But there seems to be a mysterious monster lurking in the town where the mother and son live. After returning from investigating the matter, the "demon seed" that parasitized the cat teacher's body grew into a tree and bore fruit overnight in the Fujiwara family's courtyard. And the cat teacher who ate a fruit similar in shape to himself split into three pieces——! ?

title: Rurouni Kenshin: The Great Fire of Kyoto
leader: ['Sato Ken', 'Takei Saki', 'Iseya Yusuke', 'Aoki Takabi', 'Aoi Yu', 'Kamiki Ryunosuke', 'Tsuchiya Taiho', 'Tanaka Min', 'Miyazawa Kazushi', 'Ozawa Seitsu', 'Takifuji Kenichi', 'Miura Ryousuke', 'Maruyama Tomomi', 'Takahashi Marijun', 'Eguchi Yosuke', 'Fujiwara Ryuya']
description:
Entering the Meiji Era, the former "Executioner Battousai" Himura Kenshin (played by Takeru Sato) has become accustomed to the peaceful life of Kamiya Dojo. Unexpectedly, on this day, his old friend from the Overthrow War, Okubo Toshimichi (played by Miyazawa Kazushi), known as one of the three heroes of the Restoration, invited him there. It turns out that Shishio Makoto (Fujiwara Tatsuya), who inherited the identity of Kenshin's executioner, was betrayed by the new government that year. Shishio, who was lucky enough to survive, is secretly planning a terrible plan to dominate Japan. After Okubo's death, Kenshin, who felt that he had an unshirkable responsibility, took to the road alone. On the way, he not only met Kyoto kunoichi Maki Machiso (played by Tsuchiya Tao), but also had his first encounter with Shishio in Crescent Village. At the same time, Sagara Sanosuke (played by Takashi Aoki), Kamiya Kaoru (played by Takei Saki), Myojin Yahiko (played by Kaito Oyagi), Saito Kazu (played by Eguchi Yosuke) also rushed to Kyoto one after another. In an era of gloomy clouds, a storm is brewing to sweep across the country...
                                    
                                This film is adapted from the original classic manga by Nobuhiro Watsuki.

title: Illusionist
leader: ['Jean-Claude Donda', 'Eilidh Rankin', 'Jil Aigrot', 'Didier Gustin', 'Frédéric Lebon', 'Tom Urie']
description:
In the late 1950s, the once-popular theater scene was changing. People were obsessed with television and rock and roll, and no longer paid attention to the various sideshows that they had grown up with. He is an experienced magician who is graceful and calm on the stage, but in reality he has to move to various performance venues for poor living expenses, from luxurious concert halls to shabby and remote taverns. What remains unchanged is his persistence in magic. While staying in a rural area in Scotland, the magician met a little girl. She marveled at the miraculous magic, so she secretly left her hometown and followed in the magician's footsteps. They moved to Edinburgh, and life became increasingly difficult. In order to satisfy the girl's trust in magic and her yearning for a prosperous world, the magician had to find various ways to make money...
                                    
                                The film won the 2010 European Film Festival Best Animated Film Award and the 2010 New York Film Critics Circle Best Animated Film Award.

title: The Ides of March
leader: ['Ryan Gosling', 'George Clooney', 'Philip Seymour Hoffman', 'Paul Giamatti', 'Evan Rachel Wood', 'Marissa Tomei']
description:
The U.S. presidential election has entered a heated stage, with the two candidates having a similar number of votes. There is still a week left before the primary election in Ohio. Both men regard this state as a decisive position and begin to fight openly and covertly. Stephen (Ryan Gosling), the young and promising number two person in the campaign team of one candidate Morris (George Clooney), is poached by Tom Duffy (Paul Giamatti), the leader of another candidate's campaign team, but Stephen is loyal to Morris and remains unmoved. On the other hand, Stephen was deeply attracted to the new intern Molly (Evan Rachel Wood), and the two quickly got on well.
                                    
                                Unexpectedly, Times reporter Ada (Marissa Tomei) learns of the meeting between Stephen and Tom, and uses it to blackmail Stephen into revealing the inside story of the political election. The anxious Stephen discovered another surprising secret in his interaction with Molly...

title: The Phantom of the Opera at the Royal Albert Hall: 25th Anniversary Performance
leader: ['Lemming Kalemro', 'Siara Boggs', 'Hadley Fraser', 'Sergei Polunin']
description:
This is a special performance to celebrate the 25th anniversary of the successful performance of the musical "The Phantom of the Opera", held at the Royal Albert Hall (Royal Albert Hall) in London, England. The event held a total of three massive performances on the evening of October 1, 2011, and the afternoon and evening of the next day, providing a shocking audio-visual feast to the musical fans present. At the same time as the performance, its live video was also shown on the big screen in the United Kingdom and the United States.
                                        
                                    In terms of the lineup, Iranian-Canadian musical actor Ramin Karimloo leads the lead as the male protagonist The Phantom, and American musical theater actress Sierra Boggess plays the female lead Christine Daaé. The two worked together in Weber's 2010 new play "Phantom: Love Never Dies" (Love Never Dies), which was a sequel to "The Phantom of the Opera". They were the male and female protagonists of the London premiere of "Love Never Dies". Prior to this, Ramin Karimloo had acted in the London version of "The Phantom of the Opera" from 2007 to 2009...

title: Bailuyuan
leader: ['Zhang Fengyi', 'Zhang Yuqi', 'Duan Yihong', 'Wu Gang', 'Liu Wei', 'Cheng Taishen', 'Guo Tao']
description:
On Bailuyuan, which is blessed by the legendary White Deer, descendants of the Bai and Lu families of the same origin have lived for generations. Times changed, the Qing Dynasty fell and the Republic of China was established. Bai Xiaowen (played by Cheng Taishen), the son of the current patriarch Bai Jiaxuan (played by Zhang Fengyi), Lu Zhaopeng (played by Guo Tao), the son of Xiangyue Lu Zilin (played by Wu Gang), and Heiwa (played by Duan Yihong), the son of Bai's boss Lu San, are brothers and sisters, and they all go their separate ways as adults. Hei Wa's affair with Tian Xiao'e (played by Zhang Yuqi), a young girl from the Guoju family in Weibei, was exposed. Tian Xiao'e was also excluded from the ancestral hall by the patriarch, so the two moved to a Manpo cave dwelling to live their lives. Lu Zhaopeng, who joined the Communist Party, brought back the revolutionary wave from the city, and Hei Wa became the backbone. After the split between the Kuomintang and the Communist Party, the brothers were forced to flee. Lu Zilin took the opportunity to occupy Tian Xiao'e, who was left alone, and designed to use her to frame the next patriarch Bai Xiaowen, causing an uproar within the clan... In the changing current situation, Bailu Village, known as "benevolence and righteousness", is constantly disputed, and the ancient land is facing earth-shaking changes.
                                        
                                    This film is adapted from Mr. Chen Zhongshi’s work "White Deer Plain" which won the 4th Mao Dun Literature Award. The original work spans half a century, and the film captures the turbulent changes from 1912 to 1938, with the original interpretation of Qin Opera and Cang...

title: Bollywood Robot Love Endhiran
leader: ['Aishwarya Rai', 'Rajinikantha', 'Danny Dengzongpa', 'Kochi Hanifa', 'Sab Cyril']
description: The genius scientist Vasi (played by Rajnikanth) is obsessed with designing an intelligent robot. He invests a lot of energy and emotion. He imitates his own appearance, teaches the robot various skills, takes him by his side so that he can adapt to society as soon as possible, and names it "Seventh Brother" (played by Rajnikanth). Because he forgot to eat and sleep, he was busy with work and neglected his girlfriend sana (played by Aishwarya Rai). In order to make his girlfriend happy, he agreed to his girlfriend's request to let his seventh brother accompany him for final review. At first, the seventh brother made a lot of jokes, but as time went by, the seventh brother, the almighty robot, began to show his extraordinary talents in every aspect of life. Getting along with Sana made him develop human feelings and gradually fell in love with her. The jealousy of love created a gap in the relationship between Vasi and the seventh brother. Vasi's teacher took advantage of this and began to encourage the seventh brother, inserting a virus chip into his body that turned the seventh brother into a murder tool. A steady stream of Seventh Brother robots are produced, and the world falls into chaos. Scientist Vasi and the military joined forces to start a battle to save the original kind-hearted seventh brother...

title: Caishen Inn Caishen Inn
leader: ['Nicholas Tse', 'Nick Cheung', 'Huang Yi', 'Charlene Choi', 'Liu Yang', 'Tong Dawei', 'He Jiajin', 'Zheng Haoyuan', 'Zheng Yitong']
description:
In the small city of Baima, there live two good buddies, Master Gong (played by Nicholas Tse) and Master Ba (played by Zhang Jiahui). The two signed up to be police officers. However, although they had no skills and lofty ambitions, they could only commit themselves to the kitchen and laundry room as a trainee police officer who could be beaten and beaten by anyone. On this day, the family of Zhang Yuan, a wealthy family in the city, entered Qiangliang. The whole family was killed, and no one was spared. The priceless white jade Guanyin in the family was also missing. Master Gong investigated the scene and made a correct inference about the murderer. Although he was taken over by Tie Qingwu (Kenny Ho), the god-catcher who led the twelve golden policemen, he was beaten by his senior in the same yamen and asked for death penalty. Fortunately, he met the "Twins Rogues" Water Dragon Girl (played by Huang Yi) and Fire Dragon Girl (Charlene Choi), and finally escaped after a fight.
                                    
                                In order to trace the whereabouts of the White Jade Guanyin, they went all the way to the God of Wealth Inn outside the pass, and a legend began...

title: Great Magician Great Magician
leader: ['Tony Leung', 'Liu Qingyun', 'Zhou Xun', 'Yan Ni', 'Wu Gang', 'Fang Zhongxin', 'Qin Pei', 'Lin Xue', 'Zawatian Kenye', 'Wang Ziwen', 'Wang Ziyi', 'Daniel Wu', 'Tsu Hark', 'Rong Xiang', 'Lu Jianming', 'Jiang Daohai', 'Gu Dezhao', 'Wu Tingye']
description:
At the beginning of the 20th century, the Qing Dynasty had exhausted its strength. Warlords from all walks of life were fighting for years, relying on their own troops, and staged one battle after another. Sometimes the Zhili garrison envoy Lei Daniu (played by Liu Qingyun) relies on the heretical Liu Kunshan (played by Wu Gang) to recruit troops and horses, and continues to grow. There are heavy troops outside, beautiful families inside, and strong support from the Japanese with ulterior motives. It is the time when the spring breeze is proud. At the same time, the mysterious magician Zhang Xian (played by Tony Leung) came to the capital. He defeated the capital with his amazing and miraculous skills. Naturally, even Lei Daniu had heard about it. Little did they know that Zhang Xian was the childhood sweetheart of Liu Yin (played by Zhou Xun), Daniu's seventh concubine. When he went out to study, his lover was abducted by Daniu, a life-long regret. In addition, he also belonged to a mysterious organization that always plotted to kidnap Commander Niu. In this troubled world, what kind of amazing magic will Zhang Xian perform...
                                    
                                This film is adapted from Zhang Haifan's novel of the same name.

title: best friend
leader: ['Chen Yihan', 'Fiona Sit', 'Yang Zishan', 'Shawn Yue', 'Chung Han Leung', 'Wu Jianhao']
description:
Xiwen (played by Chen Yihan), Kimmy (played by Fiona Sit) and Xiaomei (played by Yang Zishan) have always been best friends who talk about everything. The three began living together after graduating from college. The good girl Xiwen's life focuses entirely on her fiancé Lin Jie (played by Zhong Hanliang), who has been in love for seven years. However, with Lin Jie's cheating, the lives of the three sisters were completely disrupted. Kimmy, a white and rich beauty who loves men, and cool Xiaomei have to take care of Xiwen, who is confused by a broken love, around the clock, but their efforts to help their best friend are not as good as the appearance of the warm-hearted man Qiao Li (Shawn Yue). While Xiwen is doubting Qiao Li's sexual orientation, Kimmy and Xiaomei are caught in a love triangle with rock musician Jiutian (played by Wu Jianhao). The friendship crisis between the three is about to break out. Where will Xiaomei go in the end?
                                    
                                Director Huang Zhenzhen also starred in the film, playing himself, and restored the shooting scene of his documentary masterpiece "What Women Say".

title: Su Qier Su Qier
leader: ['Zhao Wenzhuo', 'Zhou Xun', 'Michelle Yeoh', 'Jay Chou', 'An Zhijie', 'Guo Xiaodong', 'Liu Jiahui', 'Jiang Luxia', 'Liu Genghong', 'Liang Jiaren', 'Xiang Zuo', 'Li Liegong', 'Yan Ni', 'Feng Xiaogang', 'David Carradine']
description: Su Can (played by Zhao Wenzhuo), who was once the most powerful general in the Qing court, gave up his great future and returned to his hometown. He originally wanted to study martial arts, establish a dynasty, and never be separated from his wife Yuan Ying (played by Zhou Xun) and their son, and enjoy a family relationship. Unexpectedly, due to a grudge from the previous generation, his sworn brother Yuan Lie (played by An Zhijie) practiced magic skills, killed Su's father, and abducted Su Can's wife and children. In the battle at the riverside, Su Can was defeated. When his life was at stake, his wife sacrificed her life to save him. Later, she was rescued by Sister Yu (Michelle Yeoh), an expert who lived in seclusion in the mountains and tasted all kinds of herbs. The two were able to save their lives. Su Can was discouraged because of a broken vein in his right arm and drank all day long to escape reality. With the careful care and encouragement of his wife, Su Can finally got back on his feet. Su Can and Yuan Lie fought again and avenged their shame, but due to impulsiveness, they were unable to rescue Yuan Ying in time, who was buried underground by Yuan Lie. After the death of his wife, the heartbroken Su Can and his son wandered to the Sino-Russian border. At this time, Su Can was like a beggar. After being drunk once, he met the "God of Martial Arts" (played by Jay Chou) who had once sparred with him in an illusion. During the fight with the God of Martial Arts, he learned a set of boxing techniques that showed the exquisiteness of martial arts while drunk - Drunken Fist. Faced with the humiliation of his countrymen and his friends and son in danger, Su Can stepped forward...

title: Westward Journey 3
leader: ['Han Geng', 'Tang Yan', 'Wu Jing', 'Mok Wenwei', 'Zhang Chao', 'Zhang Yao', 'Wang Yibo', 'Zhong Xintong', 'Xie Nan', 'He Jiong', 'Hu Jing', 'Huang Zheng', 'Liu Zhenwei', 'Cao Chengyan', 'Zhou Yixuan', 'Yuan Kui', 'Lu Jianmin', 'Fei'er', 'Du Juan', 'Wang Xingang', 'Chai Ge', 'Zhou Jin', 'Zheng Wenzheng', 'Ye Liu', 'Liu Jing', 'Peng Xintong', 'Xi Wei', 'Yu Guanghong']
description: Fairy Zixia (played by Tang Yan) who died at the cross of the Bull Demon King in "Journey to the West: The Marriage of the Great Sage" will see this fate in advance through the Moonlight Box. In order to avoid the tragedy, she chose to go back to the past to prevent the Supreme Treasure (played by Han Geng) from falling in love with her. Zhizunbao once again meets Bai Jingjing (Mok Wenwei) who has been waiting for him. All kinds of love-hate entanglements in the past and present life are once again staged for the last time in the nine reincarnations.

title: World War Z
leader: ['Brad Pitt', 'Mireille Enos', 'Matthew Fox', 'Eric West', 'David Morse', 'James Dell', 'Elyes Gabel', 'Moritz Bredo', 'Sterling Jerris', 'Daniella Kertesz']
description:
On a quiet morning in Philadelphia without warning, former UN investigator Gary Lane (played by Brad Pitt) drives his wife Karen (played by Mireille Enos) and two daughters Rachel (played by Abigail Hargrove) and Connie (played by Sterling Jerins) out. Unexpectedly, the originally happy atmosphere was soon replaced by panic and death. With serial explosions, people fleeing in fear, disorderly car accidents, and zombies biting others, the prosperous metropolis fell in an instant. Gary tried his best to escape with his wife and daughter, and finally escaped to the aircraft carrier where the United Nations Deputy Secretary-General was located. Then he learned that several heads of power, including the President of the United States, had died, and that the zombie virus had spread around the world. In order to prevent the destruction of the world, Gerry was reluctantly ordered to go to the source of the virus with Fassback (Elyes Gabel), a PhD in virology from Harvard, to find a way to end the crisis.
                                    
                                This is an almost hopeless and suffering-filled journey, with the fate of the world at stake...

title: little door god
leader: ['Gao Xiaosong', 'Baike', 'Yi Xiaoxing', 'Ji Guanlin', 'Yu Xinyi', 'Zendaya', 'Bi Xiaolan', 'Nicole Kidman', 'Ren Jie', 'Guo Zhengjian', 'Du Yuting', 'Yu Jinlong', 'Shi Lei', 'Su Haodan', 'Shen Chong', 'Zhang Xuan', 'Sun Kuan', 'Kong Yingjie', 'Mao Yue', 'Liu Yuan', 'Chen Junlong', 'Zhao Ji']
description:
The story takes place in a small town in the south of the Yangtze River in the contemporary human world and in the divine world.
                                    
                                The door gods Shen Tu and Yu Lei are two brothers. Because in recent years, humans no longer pay attention to gods, and the economy of the gods has been in recession. The door gods, earth gods, eight immortals and other minor gods are in danger of being laid off and unemployed. The door god Yu Lei decided to go to the human world and do something earth-shattering to prove the value of the door god. Yu Lei and Shen Tu came to the world one after another and met Xiaoying and Yu'er, a single mother and daughter in a small town. After that, a series of unexpected and interesting thrilling stories happened...

title: Zhong Kui Conquers Demons: Snow Demon Spirit
country: Mainland China / Hong Kong / United States
leader: ['Chen Kun', 'Li Bingbing', 'Zhao Wenxuan', 'Yang Zishan', 'Bao Beier', 'Jike Junyi']
description:
Demons are in the devil world, gods are in heaven, and humans are in the human world. It was supposed to be a different path between gods and ghosts, but the covetousness blurred the boundaries of the three realms, triggering a series of ups and downs in the fight. During the heyday of the Tang Dynasty, on July 15th of a certain year, it coincided with the golden day of immortality that rarely happens in a thousand years. Hudu, an important town in the Western Regions, was full of ghosts and ghosts, making it eerie. At that time, Zhong Kui (played by Chen Kun), a loner scholar, was rescued by Zhang Daoxian (played by Zhao Wenxuan) and became the guardian of Hudu. He slayed demons and went deep into the demon world to obtain demon spirits, thus starting a grand war with the demon world. In the process, Zhong Kui unexpectedly reunites with the girl who once fascinated him - Xue Yao (played by Li Bingbing). The two people, with completely opposite identities, cannot stop the growth of love. The battle between gods and demons gradually intensifies.
                                    
                                Zhong Kui, who was caught in the middle of the chaos and took it as his duty to defend the world, finally discovered a conspiracy that he couldn't believe...

title: Yokomichi Seinosuke
leader: ['Takara Kengo', 'Yoshitaka Yuriko', 'Ikematsu Soreito', 'Ito Ayumu', 'Ayano Tsuyoshi', 'Iura Arata', 'Kunimura Hayabusa', 'Horiuchi Keiko', 'Furoseki Yasuhiro', 'Yuki Miko', 'Asakura Aki', 'Emoto Yu']
description:
In the late 1980s, Yokomichi Seinosuke (Kora Kengo), a young man born in a seaport town, appeared on the streets of Tokyo with a confused face. Just like his somewhat strange name, Seinosuke seems to be naturally far away from the modern metropolis, but this naturally optimistic and straightforward big boy quickly integrated into his new life. In the noisy campus, he first met Kuramochi (played by Soryo Ikematsu) and Akutsu Yui (played by Asakura Aki), and briefly dated Kato Yusuke (played by Go Ayano) who had a secret. He also formed a romantic relationship with the innocent wealthy daughter Yosano Shoko (played by Yoshitaka Yuriko). He also seemed to have a good impression of Chiharu (played by Ayumi Ito) who has rich life experience. Over the years, these people would occasionally stop and think of the Shinosuke who had left beautiful memories in their lives. What kind of emotions would arise in their hearts?
                                    
                                This film is adapted from the original work of the same name by Shuichi Yoshida.

title: Low-pressure trough: City of Desire Low-pressure trough
leader: ['Nick Cheung', 'Xu Jinglei', 'He Jiong', 'Yu Nan', 'Miao Qiaowei', 'Yuanhua', 'Lin Xue', 'Zhang Keyi']
description:
Lonely City, a flashy but depraved city of sin, is filled with competition for money and interests. However, in this paradise of outlaws, there are still a few people who insist on justice in their hearts...

Adam's old friend Nick (Craig Robinson) is a "hep-rubber" who is unhappy at work; while another old friend Lou (Rob Corddry) is an alcoholic and is sent to the hospital after attempting suicide. In order to enlighten Lou, Adam and Nick decided to invite Lou to return to the Kodiak Valley Ski Resort, and Jacob also went with them. Just as the fierce battle between Big Big Wolf and Pleasant Goat (voiced by Zu Liqing) was in full swing, the violent and arrogant Huwei Taisui (voiced by Jia Yi) led many of his men to Yangcun, threatening to build a playground here. During the Anti-Japanese War, underground worker Fu Jingnian (played by Sun Honglei) had the identity of a double agent. At the height of Kangxi's reign in the Qing Dynasty, Zhaojia Chenxiang (played by Zhou Dongyu), who had been working as a palace maid since the age of thirteen, spent seven years with her good friend Liuli (played by Zhao Liying) who was also working as an errand at Qianxi Fourth School. She imposed a terrible curse on the baker (James Corden) unless he can prepare four things in three days: a white cow, a red cloak, golden hair and golden shoes.

Seeing the deadline approaching, David has not yet found a suitable partner. After a failed attempt to match up with a woman, he escapes to the forest outside the hotel, where escaped singles live. However, in this habitat where singles rebel against the hotel system, there is another completely different system...

At this time, another insider claimed that the suspect Jimmy Thomas was the illegitimate son Wan Wenfang had abandoned. This revelation also turned the nature of the case into a major "matricide" case. With the intervention of the key witness in this case, Wan Wenfang's producer Tian Jingcheng (played by Zu Feng), the truth becomes more confusing.

description:
On the streets of downtown Hong Kong, a mortgage car was hijacked by Cao Nan (played by Hu Jun), a criminal with a long history of criminal records. Senior Inspector Lu Mingzhe (played by Andy Lau) of the Crime Unit led his team to the scene and had a fierce fight with Cao Nan and his gang. Unexpectedly, at the critical moment, a car suddenly appeared and disrupted the battle. Cao Nan took the opportunity to escape, and the owner of the car, Tao Chengbang (played by Lin Jiadong), was invited into the police station by the police. Tao and Mingzhe were old classmates, and later wandered around the world as Young and Dangerous. He had just been released from prison before the accident. Mingzhe and Chengbang's girlfriend Yan Bing (played by Yao Chen) do not believe that he has anything to do with Cao Nan, and the arrogant Cao Nan teases the police five times. In order to catch this cunning and fierce opponent, Mingzhe decided to arrange for a spy to infiltrate the opponent, but suffered a tragic defeat.

Three years later, d'Artagnan (Logan Lerman), who has practiced swordsmanship as a fledgling, comes to Paris to join the musketeer Captain Treville (Matthew Macfadyen). He is acquainted with the Three Musketeers and unexpectedly becomes close friends. At the same time, he meets the queen's maid and falls in love with him at first sight. Soon after, everyone unexpectedly learned that the powerful Cardinal Richelieu (played by Christoph Waltz) wanted to sow discord between Britain and France for his own plan to destroy the country, intending to create a royal scandal and cause King Louis XIII to misunderstand Queen Anna. In order to fight against the evil conspiracy of the red leader, protect Queen Anna's innocence, and maintain peaceful relations between Britain and France, the people with a sense of justice started a battle of wits and courage with their enemies. D'Artagnan relied on his excellent sword...

title: The Maze Runner

description:
The boy Thomas (Dylan O'Brien) woke up in an elevator, and the strange thing was that he couldn't remember anything except his name. When the elevator opened, he came to a strange place "the glade". It is surrounded by tall stone walls. Many boys live inside the walls, including Newt (Thomas Sangster), Chuck (Blake Cooper), Mino (Ki Hong Lee) and others. They are all trapped in a maze, and there is a group of huge monsters threatening them outside the wall. One day, the elevator brought them a girl, Teresa (played by Kaya Scodelario), who was the first girl here. After that, the maze gradually began to change, and everything fell into chaos. Thomas and Teresa decided to embark on the road to crack the maze together and find out the chilling secret behind it.

description:
A rare meteor shower is about to appear over Russia. Young men and women are very excited and take to the streets to witness this historic moment. The beautiful girl Yulia (played by Irina Starshenbaum) insists on dating Temu (played by Alexander Petrov) despite the opposition of her father, an officer. On the day when the meteor shower came, they hid in a corner and had fun, but they didn't know that a huge crisis was coming. An alien spacecraft encountered an accident and was hit by the Russian Air Force. It caused a devastating blow to Moscow during the emergency landing, and Yulia's best friend also died in the disaster. After that, Yulia and her friends broke into the restricted area and encountered aliens. By mistake, she decides to treat the seriously injured alien pilot Hank (Rinal Mukhametov). Temu and others hate the disasters caused by aliens and hate Hank.
                                    
                                Love that spans time and space arises in this process...

title: Dee Renjie's Dragon King

description:
During the Linde period of the Tang Dynasty, Tang Gaozong (played by Sheng Jian) ​​and Wu Zetian (played by Carina Lau) forcefully sent out a large army for an expedition. Unexpectedly, the fleet was attacked in the sea and suffered a heavy setback. This incident shocked Luoyang, and the people in the capital enthusiastically worshiped the Dragon King. The "Oiran" Yin Ruiji (played by Yang Ying) who confused all living beings even attracted the covetous attention of all parties. Di Renjie (played by Zhao Youting) was ordered by Empress Wu to investigate the case of the Dragon King, but he happened to be involved in the case of kidnapping Yin Ruiji. In the process of fighting the robbers, Di Renjie met Yuchi Zhenjin (played by Feng Shaofeng), the minister of Dali Temple who was both an enemy and a friend, and was thrown into prison by the other party. The Dragon King's figure reappears in the case of Yin Ruiji, adding a cloud of doubt over Luoyang. In prison, Di Renjie relied on careful reasoning to win the trust of Huihe medical worker Sha Tuozhong (played by Lin Gengxin), escaped from prison and found out the truth about King Long.
